deliverableArray.bulletPoint: General and Compliance Requirements

description.en: General requirements, compliance with standards, and equivalence proofs.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Execution description is binding as minimum requirement

description.en: The 'Execution Description' is binding as a minimum requirement for all bidders. Non-fulfillment leads to exclusion of the offer.
description.original: Die 'Ausführungsbeschreibung' sind als Mindestanforderungen für alle Bieter bindend. Eine Nichterfüllung dieser Mindestanforderungen hat das Ausscheiden des Angebotes zur Folge.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Size and quantity according to LV specifications

description.en: The size and quantity of the items must be delivered according to the specifications in the bill of quantities (LV).
description.original: Größe und Stückzahl entsprechend LV-Angaben.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Deviations from binding standards and regulations are not permitted

description.en: Deviations from binding standards, regulations, codes, legal requirements, etc. are not allowed under any circumstances.
description.original: Abweichungen von bindenden Normen, Vorschriften, Regelwerken, gesetzlichen Vorgaben, etc. sind keinesfalls zulässig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Submit proof of equivalence for any deviations

description.en: Proof of equivalence must be provided by the bidder and attached to the offer at the time of submission.
description.original: Gleichwertigkeitsnachweise sind durch den Bieter zu erbringen und zum Zeitpunkt der Angebotsabgabe dem Angebot beizulegen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Building and Ceiling Conditions

description.en: Requirements related to building conditions, ceilings, and floor finishes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory rooms are generally without suspended ceiling

description.en: The laboratory rooms are generally constructed without a suspended ceiling. Some rooms have a partial suspended ceiling at a height of 300 cm above finished floor level.
description.original: Die Laborräume sind generell ohne Zwischendecke ausgeführt. Einzelne Räume sind teilweise mit einer Zwischendecke (Höhe 300 cm ü. FFBOK = Fertige Fußbodenoberkante) ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No suspended ceiling in certain rooms

description.en: Some rooms are executed without a suspended ceiling; individual rooms may have a suspended ceiling at a height of 300 cm above finished floor level.
description.original: ohne Zwischendecke aus geführt. Einzelne Räume sind teilweise mit einer Zwischendecke (Höhe 300 cm ü. FFBOK) ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory floors equipped with base coves

description.en: All laboratory room floors are equipped with base coves (Sockelhochzüge) executed as coving (Hohlkehlen), approximately 100 mm high.
description.original: Sämtliche Fußböden der Laborräume sind mit Sockelhochzügen ausgestattet. Diese Hochzüge sind als Hohlkehlen ausgeführt, die Höhe des einzelnen Hochzuges beträgt ca. 100mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Design and Aesthetics

description.en: Requirements for uniform design, aesthetics, and color specifications.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cutouts in table tops for pipes without media cell

description.en: For laboratory rows without a media cell, appropriate cutouts must be provided in the table tops, and the drain pipe between the top of the table top and the bottom of the upper cabinet must be concealed.
description.original: Dies betrifft Laborzeilen mit und ohne Medienzelle, im letzteren Fall sind entsprechend Ausschnitte an Tischplatten vorzusehen, sowie das Abflussrohr zwischen OK Tischplatte und UK Oberschrank zu verblenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Uniform design of laboratory furniture system

description.en: The laboratory furniture must have a uniform design and be offered as a complete system. Each component must reflect its identity as part of the system.
description.original: die Laboreinrichtung ein einheitliches Design aufweisen. Es ist ein Laboreinrichtungssystem anzubieten. Jede der Einrichtungskomponenten muss den Erkennungswert als Bestandteil des Einrichtungssystems widerspiegeln.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Aesthetic and homogeneous appearance of furniture system

description.en: The entire furniture system must appear aesthetically pleasing and homogeneous in terms of geometries, height and depth structures, joint patterns, handles, and colors.
description.original: Die Einrichtung als Ganze hat in ihrer Erscheinung (Geometrien, Höhen- und Tiefenstrukturen, Fugenbilder, Griffe und Farben) formschön und homogen zu wirken.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cable routing color matches support frame or white on wall

description.en: The color of the cable routing must match that of the support frame, except when running along the wall, in which case it must be white up to entry into the lab furniture.
description.original: Die Farbgebung dieser Kabelführung hat jener des Traggestells zu entsprechen (Ausnahme: verläuft diese Kabelführung an der Wand, so ist diese bis zur Einleitung in das Labormöbel weiß auszuführen).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture system from industrial series production components

description.en: The laboratory furniture system must be constructed from components that originate from industrial series production.
description.original: Das Labormöbelsystem ist aus Komponenten, welche einer industriellen Serienfertigung entspringen, aufzubauen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Interchangeable and combinable elements

description.en: Laboratory furniture must be assembled from functional and combinable elements to allow extensive interchangeability.
description.original: Um eine weitgehende Austauschbarkeit zu ermöglichen, sind die Laboreinrichtungen aus funktionsgerechten und kombinierbaren Elementen zusammenzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Substructure exchangeability must be considered

description.en: The possibility of exchanging substructures at a later date must be taken into account in design and pricing.
description.original: Die Möglichkeit des Austausches von Unterbauten zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt ist konstruktiv und preislich zu berücksichtigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Blinds required for corner constructions

description.en: For corner constructions, blinds must be provided regardless of whether they are listed in the performance description.
description.original: Dies gilt in besonderem Maße bei Eckverbauten – hier sind jedenfalls Blenden vorzusehen (unabhängig, ob diese in der Leistungsbeschreibung ggf.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labormöbel in geforderter Qualität anbieten

description.en: Laboratory furniture must be offered in the required quality, manufactured according to industrial standards and current state of the art.
description.original: Es sind Labormöbel in der in diesem LV geforderten Qualität anzubieten, diese sind nach Industriestandard und dem gegenwärtigen Stand der Technik entsprechend zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Energieeffiziente und betriebskostenoptimierte Komponenten

description.en: Components must be offered that are optimized for energy efficiency and operating costs.
description.original: Es sind Komponenten anzubieten, welche hinsichtlich Energieeffizienz und Betriebskosten optimiert sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Farbausführung nach Standard-Farbkarte des Herstellers

description.en: The color execution of the furniture must be offered and calculated according to the laboratory furniture manufacturer's standard color chart.
description.original: Anzubieten und einzukalkulieren ist die farbliche Ausführung der Möbel nach der Standard-Farbkarte des Labormöbelherstellers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Submit sample materials for table tops, fronts, bases

description.en: The tenderer must include samples of table top materials, fronts, bases, and a description of the color scheme of other furniture components.
description.original: Tischplattenmaterialien, Fronten, Sockel, etc. sind dem Angebot beizulegen, ebenso eine Beschreibung der Farbgebung der weiteren Möbelkomponenten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Black furniture base and baseboard

description.en: The furniture base and baseboard (Sockelbrett) must be executed in black color. The base color is specified as black; the baseboard must be black as per architect, with other colors only according to manufacturer standard.
description.original: Vorgabe Farbe Möbelsockel: schwarz!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media Cells and Utility Outlets

description.en: Requirements for media cells, utility outlets, and connection points.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells and frame constructions must be adapted to the executed outlets

description.en: Media cells and frame constructions must be adapted and executed according to the executed outlets. Frame elements must be positioned so they do not lie on or in front of media outlets.
description.original: Die Medienzellen und Ständerkonstruktionen sind entsprechend den ausgeführten Auslässen anzupassen und auszuführen. Ständerelemente, etc. sind so zu positionieren, dass diese nicht auf bzw. vor Medienauslässen zu liegen kommen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells should be executed with as few joints as possible

description.en: Media cells should be executed with as few joints as possible and may extend beyond the dimensions of under-counters and over-counters.
description.original: Medienzellen sollen mit möglichst wenigen Stoßstellen ausgeführt werden, und dürfen auch über die Abmessungen von Unter- und Oberschränken hinausgehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Flexibility in arrangement of shelves must be maintained

description.en: Flexibility in the arrangement of shelves, etc. must be guaranteed even if media cells extend beyond standard dimensions.
description.original: Jedoch muss die Flexibilität in der Anordnung von Tablaren, etc. gewährleistet bleiben.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: On-site outlets come from floor, wall, or ceiling

description.en: The on-site outlets are provided from the floor, the wall, or the ceiling.
description.original: Die bauseitigen Auslässe erfolgen vom Boden, aus der Wand oder von der Decke.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection points of laboratory rows are shown in plans

description.en: The connection points of the laboratory rows are shown in the plans; for fume hoods, the connection points end in the area of the fume hood.
description.original: Die Anschlusspunkte der Laborzeilen sind in den Plänen dargestellt, bei Digestorien enden die Anschlussstellen im Bereich des Digestoriums.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas and water lines end with ball valves at 275-285 cm above finished floor; pipe material specified in 'Gasversorgung'

description.en: Gas and water lines end with ball valves at approximately 275-285 cm above finished floor level in the area above the laboratory row. From this interface, the pipe routing is the contractor's responsibility. The pipe material for gas and water lines is specified in the position 'Gasversorgung'.
description.original: Gas- und Wasserleitungen enden mit Kugelhähnen in ca. 275 - 285cm über FFBOK im Bereich oberhalb der Laborzeile. Ab dieser Schnittstelle obliegt die Leitungsführung dem Auftragnehmer.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical Supply and Outlets

description.en: Requirements for electrical supply, outlets, and connections.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Power supply cable 5x6mm² from transfer point to lab bench

description.en: Each laboratory row or row group is electrically supplied with a 5x6mm² cable routed from the transfer point (see floor plans) from above into the lab bench. Supply and installation of cable routing (rectangular cable duct, formed tube) between lab furniture and transfer point is included in the scope and must be performed by the contractor.
description.original: Jede Laborzeile bzw. jeder Laborzeilenverband wird elektrisch mit einem bauseitigen 5x6mm²-Kabel angespeist.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Supply and install electrical ducts with fuse box, RCD, and MCBs

description.en: Electrical ducts with built-in components including fuse box with residual-current device (FI-Schutzschalter) and miniature circuit breakers for final circuits are included in the contractor's scope.
description.original: Elektrokanäle mit Einbauten inkl. Sicherungskasten mit FI-Schutzschalter und Leitungsschutzschaltern für die Endstromkreise sind ebenfalls im Leistungsumfang des Auftragnehmers erfasst.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply from corresponding lab bench

description.en: The electrical supply of these channels comes from the corresponding laboratory bench.
description.original: Die elektrische Versorgung dieser Kanäle erfolgt über die entsprechende Laborzeile.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical outlets: 400V/16A, 400V/32A, 230V, RJ45

description.en: Electrical outlets included: 1x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A, 25x 230V, 2x DD RJ45.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Entire laboratory/room powered by uninterruptible power supply (UPS)

description.en: The entire laboratory and each room must be equipped with an uninterruptible power supply (USV).
description.original: gesamtes Labor USV!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/16A UPS supply

description.en: Provide one 400V/16A connection from the uninterruptible power supply (UPS).
description.original: 1x 400V/16A (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/32A UPS supply

description.en: Provide one 400V/32A connection from the uninterruptible power supply (UPS).
description.original: 1x 400V/32 A (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 3x 32A/400V (in room UG.59)

description.en: The room must have three 32A/400V electrical outlets. Specifically, three 32A/400V electrical outlets are required in room UG.59.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 1x 16A/400V (in room UG.59)

description.en: The room must have one 16A/400V electrical outlet. Specifically, one 16A/400V electrical outlet is required in room UG.59.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 30x 16A/230V sockets (in room UG.59)

description.en: The room must have 30 standard 16A/230V sockets. Specifically, thirty 16A/230V sockets are required in room UG.59.
description.original: 30x 16A/230V Steckdosen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 12x 230V outlets in room 2.OG.11

description.en: The laboratory room 2.OG.11 (02.6) must include 12x 230V electrical outlets.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 1x 400V/16A outlet in room 2.OG.11

description.en: The laboratory room 2.OG.11 (02.6) must include 1x 400V/16A electrical outlet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical supply: 1x 400V/32A outlet in room 2.OG.11

description.en: The laboratory room 2.OG.11 (02.6) must include 1x 400V/32A electrical outlet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 4.1 lfm with 12x 230V, 3x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A, 1x 400V/63A, 1x DD RJ45

description.en: Provide a media channel of 4.1 running meters including 12 sockets at 230V, 3 sockets at 400V/16A, 1 socket at 400V/32A, 1 socket at 400V/63A, and 1 double data RJ45 connection.
description.original: Medienkanal 4,1lfm inkl. 12x 230V, 3x 400V/16A, 1x 40 0V/32A, 1x 400V/63A, 1x DD RJ45

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 3.2 lfm with 8x 230V (UPS) and 1x 400V/16A (UPS)

description.en: Provide a media channel of 3.2 linear meters including 8x 230V outlets (UPS) and 1x 400V/16A outlet (UPS).
description.original: Medienkanal 3,2lfm inkl. 8x 230V (USV), 1x 400V/16A (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 4.5 lfm including 8x 230V (AV)

description.en: Provide a media channel 4.5 linear meters including 8x 230V (AV) outlets.
description.original: Medienkanal 4,5lfm inkl. 8x 230V (AV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wall workbench [I] with 16x 230V (AV) electrical supply

description.en: Provide electrical supply with 16 outlets at 230V (AV) for wall workbench [I].
description.original: Elektroversorgung 16x 230V (AV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connect 5x6mm² cable from safety power supply to furniture terminals

description.en: A 5x6mm² cable from the safety power supply must be routed by the laboratory furniture manufacturer to the connection terminals in the furniture, similar to the described method.
description.original: dazu endet analog zu oben beschrieben ein 5x6mm²- Kabel, welches vom Labormöbelhersteller in oben beschriebener Weise an die Anschlussklemmen im Möbel zu führen ist.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection of extraction points via cable and plug connectors

description.en: The connection of individual extraction points must be via cable and plug connectors.
description.original: Deshalb ist es erforderlich, dass die Verbindung der einzelnen Entnahmestellen über Kabel- und Steckverbindungen erfolgt!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection for contact transmitter

description.en: The station must include a connection for a contact transmitter.
description.original: Anschluss für Kontaktgeber

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Supply Schuko sockets in color specified by electrical contractor

description.en: Schuko sockets connected to the safety power supply must be supplied in a color specified by the electrical contractor; coordination is the contractor's responsibility.
description.original: Die an die Sicherheitsstromversorgung angeschlossenen Schuko- Steckdosen sind in farbiger Ausführung (Farbe nach Vorgabe des Elektro-Auftragnehmers) zu liefern, die diesbezügliche Koordination obliegt dem Auftragnehmer.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Even distribution of electrical and IT outlets along lab benches

description.en: Electrical and IT outlets must be evenly distributed along the length of each lab bench row, with four 230V sockets per linear meter of bench.
description.original: Elektro- und EDV-Dosen sind gleichmäßig über die Länge der jeweiligen Laborzeilen aufzuteilen (die Aufteilung hat dabei so zu erfolgen, dass die angegebene Steckdosenanzahl gleichmäßig so aufgeteilt wird, dass vier Stk. 230V-Steckdosen pro Laufmeter Laborzeile installiert werden)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Schuko sockets with cover and labeling field

description.en: Schuko sockets must be executed with a cover and a labeling field. Labeling is the contractor's responsibility and must follow the ÖBA's specifications.
description.original: Schukosteckdosen sind mit Deckel und Beschriftungsfeld auszuführen (Beschriftung obliegt dem Auftragnehmer und ist nach Vorgabe der ÖBA durchzuführen)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Simultaneous use of stacked sockets with angled plugs

description.en: If sockets are arranged one above the other, simultaneous use of these sockets with angled plugs must be possible.
description.original: Sind Steckdosen übereinander angeordnet, so muss die gleichzeitige Nutzung dieser Steckdosen mit Winkelsteckern möglich sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: CEE sockets with flap cover for three-phase power

description.en: CEE sockets with a flap cover must be used as three-phase power sockets.
description.original: Als Drehstromsteckdosen sind CEE-Steckdosen mit Klappdeckel zu verwenden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Number of sockets per LV specifications

description.en: The number of sockets must be according to the LV (bill of quantities) specifications.
description.original: Anzahl der Steckdosen entsprechend LV-Angaben

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical: 4x 16A/230V sockets in nuclear storage room

description.en: The nuclear storage room must be equipped with 4 sockets rated at 16A/230V.
description.original: 4x 16A/230V Steckdosen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 3.1 lfm with 4x 230V, 1x DD RJ45 for wall workbench

description.en: The wall workbench must include a media channel 3.1 linear meters with 4 electrical outlets 230V and 1 data outlet RJ45.
description.original: Medienkanal 3,1lfm inkl. 4x 230V, 1x DD RJ45

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 4.9 lfm with 8x 230V, 2x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A, 1x 230V/32A for media cell [F]

description.en: The media cell [F] must include a media channel 4.9 linear meters with 8 outlets 230V, 2 outlets 400V/16A, 1 outlet 400V/32A, and 1 outlet 230V/32A.
description.original: Medienkanal 4,9lfm inkl. 8x 230V, 2x 400V/16A, 1x 400 V/32A, 1x 230V/32A

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel 3.1 lfm with 4x 230V, 1x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A for media cell [G]

description.en: The media cell [G] must include a media channel 3.1 linear meters with 4 outlets 230V, 1 outlet 400V/16A, and 1 outlet 400V/32A.
description.original: Medienkanal 3,1lfm inkl. 4x 230V, 1x 400V/16A, 1x 400 V/32A

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 54x 230V electrical outlets in media channel

description.en: Include 54 electrical outlets at 230V in the media channel.
description.original: inkl. 54x 230V

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 2x 230V (UPS) outlets in media channel

description.en: Include 2 electrical outlets at 230V connected to an uninterruptible power supply (UPS) in the media channel.
description.original: 2x 230V (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/16A outlet in media channel

description.en: Include 1 electrical outlet at 400V and 16A in the media channel.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory outlet [D] with 11x 230V sockets

description.en: The tender requires a laboratory outlet type D with 11 sockets at 230V.
description.original: LO [D], inkl. 11x 230V

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 230V (UPS) socket

description.en: The tender requires one 230V socket connected to an uninterruptible power supply (UPS).
description.original: 1x 230V (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/16A socket

description.en: The tender requires one 400V socket rated at 16A.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/32A socket

description.en: The tender requires one 400V socket rated at 32A.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 1x 400V/84A socket

description.en: The tender requires one 400V socket rated at 84A.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 3x 32A/400V electrical outlets in technical room UG.60

description.en: The technical room UG.60 (11.40.3) must have three 32A/400V electrical outlets.
description.original: Elektro: - 3x 32A/400V

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 4x 16A/230V sockets in technical room UG.60

description.en: The technical room UG.60 (11.40.3) must have four 16A/230V sockets.
description.original: Elektro: - 4x 16A/230V Steckdosen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical: 3x 32A/400V outlets in room UG.61

description.en: Three 32A/400V electrical outlets are required in room UG.61.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical: 1x 16A/400V outlet in room UG.61

description.en: One 16A/400V electrical outlet is required in room UG.61.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical: 30x 16A/230V sockets in room UG.61

description.en: Thirty 16A/230V sockets are required in room UG.61.
description.original: 30x 16A/230V Steckdosen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wall workbench [B] with media channel 5.2 lfm including 14x 230V, 7x 230V (UPS), 1x 400V/16A (UPS), 1x 400V/32A (UPS)

description.en: Provide a wall workbench [B] with a media channel 5.2 lfm including 14x 230V outlets, 7x 230V (UPS), 1x 400V/16A (UPS), and 1x 400V/32A (UPS).
description.original: Medienkanal 5,2lfm inkl. 14x 230V, 7x 230V (USV), 1x 400V/16A (USV), 1x 400V/32A (USV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipes and Connections

description.en: Requirements for pipe materials, joints, and flexible hoses.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection using polypropylene pipes

description.en: Connections must be made using polypropylene (PP) pipes of appropriate dimension for the exhaust air volume.
description.original: Der Anschluss hat dabei grundsätzlich mittels Rohren aus Polypropylen (PP) - in einer der Abluftmenge entsprechenden Dimension - zu erfolgen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe joints to be welded or using sockets

description.en: Pipe joints must be either welded or made using sockets; joining solely with adhesive tape is not permitted.
description.original: Rohrverbindungen sind entweder geschweißt oder mittels Muffen auszuführen, die alleinige Verbindung mit Klebeband ist keinesfalls zulässig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Flexible hoses only in exceptional cases

description.en: The use of flexible hoses is only permitted in exceptional cases, and the length to be bridged must be kept to a minimum.
description.original: Die Verwendung von flexiblen Schläuchen ist nur in Ausnahmefällen zulässig, wobei die zu überbrückende Länge auf ein Minimum zu beschränken ist

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Measurement according to ÖVE 8001

description.en: All necessary measurements must be carried out according to ÖVE 8001, if required jointly with the electrical contractor, coordination by the contractor.
description.original: sämtlicher notwendiger Messungen nach ÖVE 8001 (falls erforderlich gemeinsam mit dem AN ET, Koordination erfolgt durch den Auftragnehmer)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Materials and Dimensions

description.en: Requirements for materials, dimensions, and load-bearing specifications.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Multi-layer flat pressed boards for module panels and other panels

description.en: The panel material for modules, fascias, back walls, etc. must be multi-layer flat pressed boards, coated on both sides with coating class 2 (coating thickness >0.14mm).
description.original: Als Plattenmaterial für diese Module sind mehrschichtige Flachpressplatten zu verwenden, welche beidseitig in Beschichtungsklasse 2 (Beschichtungsstärke >0,14mm) beschichtet sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Coated panels thickness >= 5mm

description.en: Corresponding coated panels must have a thickness of at least 5mm.
description.original: entsprechende, beschichtete Platten in einer Dicke von >= 5mm verwendet werden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wood parts specifications: glue type V20, coating class 2, abrasion resistance S

description.en: All wood parts must have glue type V20, coating class 2 with coating thickness greater than 0.14mm, and abrasion resistance class S.
description.original: Verleimung V20

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelves and bottom: 19mm melamine resin chipboard

description.en: Shelves and bottom must be made of 19mm thick melamine resin chipboard, plastic-coated on both sides, per DIN 68 765 (abrasion resistance S, coating class 2, coating >0.14mm, emission class E1).
description.original: aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter, 19mm dicker Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, nach DIN 68 765 (Abriebwiderstand S, Beschichtungsklasse 2 Beschichtung größer 0,14mm Emissionsklasse E1) zu fertigen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelves and bottom from OSB board for width >600mm

description.en: Shelves and lower bottom must be made of directly coated OSB board (22mm thick) for grid widths >600mm.
description.original: Fachböden und unterer Boden sind ab einer Rasterbreite > 600mm aus direkt beschichteter OSB-Platte (22mm dick) auszuführen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer back and bottom from 16mm melamine resin board per DIN 68765

description.en: The back and bottom of the drawers must be made of 16mm thick, double-sided plastic-coated melamine resin flat press board according to DIN 68765.
description.original: Die Rückseite und der Boden der Schubladen sind aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, 16mm dick, nach DIN 68765 zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Base made of waterproof plywood min 16mm

description.en: The base must be made entirely of at least 16mm thick waterproof glued plywood according to DIN 68705.
description.original: komplett aus mindestens 16mm dickem, wasserfest verleimtem Sperrholz nach DIN 68705 gefertigt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet body and fronts: 19mm melamine resin chipboard, both sides coated

description.en: The cabinet body must be made of 19mm thick melamine resin chipboard coated on both sides, per DIN 68 765 (abrasion resistance S, coating class 2, coating >0.14mm, emission class E1). The fronts must be manufactured in the same quality as the cabinet body.
description.original: Er ist zu fertigen aus beidseitig kunststoffbeschichteter Melaminharz-Flachpressplatte, 19mm dick, nach DIN 68 765 (Abriebwiderstand S, Beschichtungsklasse 2 Beschichtung größer 0,14mm Emissionsklasse E1).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Back panel: 4mm MDF board, painted both sides, grooved and glued

description.en: The back panel must be a 4mm thick MDF board, painted on both sides, grooved and glued.
description.original: Die Rückwand ist als eine beidseitig lackierte MDF-Platte, 4mm dick, eingenutet und verleimt zu realisieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel material: powder-coated steel sheet or anodised aluminium

description.en: The media channels must be completely made of powder-coated steel sheet or anodised aluminium (eloxiert).
description.original: Die Medienkanäle sind komplett aus Stahlblech pulverbeschichtet.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ceiling anchor: powder-coated solid steel profile

description.en: The ceiling anchor must be fabricated from a powder-coated solid steel profile.
description.original: Der Deckenanker ist aus pulverbeschichtetem Voll-Stahlprofil zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Function carrier: powder-coated perforated steel profile, approx. 130 mm wide

description.en: The function carrier must be fabricated from a powder-coated, perforated steel profile approximately 130 mm wide.
description.original: Der Funktionsträger selbst ist aus pulverbeschichtetem ca. 130mm breitem, durchbrochenem Stahlprofil zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Panels and back wall: 19mm directly coated particleboard

description.en: The front side of the panels and the back wall must be made of 19mm thick directly coated particleboard.
description.original: Die außen liegende Seite ist aus direkt beschichteter, 19mm dicker Spanplatte zu fertigen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood lining and inner air guide wall: phenolic resin solid core

description.en: The fume hoods must be offered with a lining (inner side) made of phenolic resin solid core. The inner air guide wall must be made of 5mm solid core material.
description.original: Die Abzüge sind mit einer Auskleidung (innen liegende Seite) in Phenolharz-Vollkern anzubieten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Actuator material: PP (polypropylene)

description.en: The material of the complete actuator must be polypropylene (PP).
description.original: Material des kompletten Stellgliedes in PP

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Extraction pipe material: anodized light metal or equivalent

description.en: Extraction pipes must be made of anodized light metal or equivalent material.
description.original: Material der Absaugrohre Leichtmetall (eloxiert) oder gleichwertig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Articulated connector material: polypropylene or equivalent

description.en: Articulated connectors must be made of polypropylene or equivalent material.
description.original: Gelenkverbinder aus Polypropylen oder gleichwertig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wall/ceiling bracket material: powder-coated steel

description.en: Wall or ceiling brackets must be made of powder-coated steel.
description.original: Wand- bzw. Deckenhalter aus pulverbeschichtetem Stahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Extraction hood material: PP (polypropylene)

description.en: The extraction hood must be made of polypropylene (PP).
description.original: Material: PP

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stainless steel exterior cladding

description.en: The washer must have a stainless steel outer casing.
description.original: Außenverkleidung Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stainless steel wash chamber and water guide

description.en: The wash chamber and water guide must be made of stainless steel.
description.original: Spülraum und Wasserführung aus Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stainless steel inlet pipe

description.en: The inlet pipe must be made of stainless steel.
description.original: Zuflussrohr: Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fabric-reinforced connection hoses

description.en: The connection hoses must be fabric-reinforced.
description.original: Verbindungsschläuche: gewebeverstärkt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with standard 14 322 for wood-based materials - melamine-coated panels for indoor use

description.en: The tender requires compliance with standard 14 322 for wood-based materials, specifically melamine-coated panels for indoor use.
description.original: 14 322 Holzwerkstoffe - Melaminbesch. Platten zur Verwendung im Innenber.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with standard 16 926 for decorative high-pressure laminate panels

description.en: The tender requires compliance with standard 16 926 for decorative high-pressure laminate panels.
description.original: 16 926 Dekorative Schichtpressstoffplatten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table top made of phenolic resin solid core

description.en: Table top must be made of phenolic resin solid core (Phenolharz-Vollkern). Quantity: 6.60 linear meters.
description.original: Tischplatte Phenolharz-Vollkern

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Panel thickness must meet load-bearing requirements per standard; body panels minimum 19mm

description.en: The panel thickness must meet the load-bearing requirements according to the standard; for body panels it should be at least 19mm (including coating).
description.original: Die Plattenstärke (Dicke) muss den Anforderungen an die Tragfähigkeit (gemäß Norm) entsprechen; sie soll für Korpusplatten >= 19mm betragen (inkl. Beschichtung).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawers divided into standard height units (HE) for sitting and standing work heights

description.en: Drawers must be divided according to standard height units (HE). For sitting work height (approx. 750mm), division into 3 or 4 HE should be possible; for standing work height, division into 4 or 5 HE should be possible. The height division applies to all under-counter fronts, whether drawers, doors, or other pulls and openings.
description.original: Laden werden nach üblichen Höheneinheiten (HE) eingeteilt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Dimensions

description.en: Requirements specifying sizes, widths, depths, heights, and tolerances of furniture and components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell widths and depths for wall row and double row

description.en: The media cells must be available in widths of 600, 900, 1200, 1500, and 1800 mm. For wall row media cells, the stand depth must be approximately 75 mm, with a total table depth of 750 or 900 mm. For double row media cells, the stand depth must be approximately 92 mm, with a total table depth of 1500 or 1800 mm.
description.original: Abmessungen der Medienzellen: Breite (in mm): 600, 900, 1200, 1500, 1800

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plate thickness 28 +/- 3 mm with bead edge 7 +/- 1 mm

description.en: Plate thickness must be 28 mm with a tolerance of +/- 3 mm. Bead edge must be 7 mm with a tolerance of +/- 1 mm.
description.original: Plattenstärke 28 +/- 3mm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Base height adapted to roller height approx 110mm with clear height 17 cm

description.en: The base height must be adapted to the roller height of mobile substructures, approximately 110mm. The substructures must be executed with an adapted base having a clear height of 17 centimeters. The cabinet base height must be adapted to the roller height of the mobile underframes, approximately 110mm.
description.original: Die Sockelhöhe ist angepasst an die Rollenhöhe der fahrbaren Unterbauten (ca. 110mm)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet body height minimum 700mm

description.en: The height of the cabinet body must be at least 700mm.
description.original: Die Höhe des Korpus beträgt mindestens 700mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media channel minimum height: 150 mm

description.en: The media channel must be at least 150 mm high.
description.original: mind. 150mm hoch

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf depth as per specification, minimum dimensions

description.en: Shelf depth must be according to the performance description, with the specified depths understood as minimum dimensions.
description.original: Regaltiefe entsprechend Leistungsbeschreibung, wobei die angegebenen Tiefenangaben als Mindestmaß zu verstehen sind

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood/cupboard must be offered in widths 1200, 1500, 1800, and 2100 mm

description.en: The fume hood and fume cupboard must be offered in the grid sizes 1200, 1500, 1800, and 2100 mm as per the item description.
description.original: Der Abzug ist gemäß Positionsbeschreibung in den Rastern 1200, 1500, 1800 und 2100mm anzubieten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Clear access width and interior width should minimize reduction of external geometry

description.en: The clear access width and clear interior width of the fume cupboard should reduce the external geometry as little as possible. The clear opening width and interior width of the fume hood must be only about 250mm less than its external geometry.
description.original: Die lichte Eingriffsbreite und die lichte Innenraumbreite des Abzuges sollen die äußere Geometrie möglichst wenig unterschreiten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood working height 900 mm and total depth 900 mm

description.en: The fume hood must have a working height of 900 mm and a total depth of 900 mm.
description.original: Der Abzug hat eine Arbeitshöhe von 900mm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Extraction hood width per specification and depth at least 60 cm

description.en: The width of the extraction hood must be as per the performance specification. The depth of the extraction hood must be at least 60 cm.
description.original: Breite entsprechend Leistungsbeschreibung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drain hose length 170 cm

description.en: The drain hose must be 170 cm long.
description.original: Länge Ablaufschlauch: 170 cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wash chamber dimensions H x W x D

description.en: The wash chamber dimensions must be height 500 mm, width 535 mm, depth upper 474 mm and lower 516 mm.
description.original: Spülraummaße H I B I T [mm]: 500 / 535 / O 474, U 516

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet widths per bill of quantities

description.en: Cabinet widths must be as specified in the bill of quantities (LV).
description.original: Schrankbreiten lt. LV-Angaben

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Offer in widths 1200, 1500, 1800 mm

description.en: The fume hood must be offered in the grid sizes 1200, 1500, and 1800 mm as per the item description.
description.original: Der Abzug ist gemäß Positionsbeschreibung in den Rastern 1200, 1500 und 1800 anzubieten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fume hood must be offered in grids 1200, 1500, 1800, and 2100 mm

description.en: The fume hood must be offered in the grids 1200, 1500, 1800, and 2100 mm as per item description.
description.original: Der Abzug ist gemäß Positionsbeschreibung in den Rastern 1200, 1500, 1800 und 2100mm anzubieten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Clear opening width and interior width tolerance

description.en: The clear opening width and interior width of the fume hood must be only about 250mm less than its external geometry.
description.original: Die lichte Eingriffsbreite und die lichte Innenraumbreite des Abzuges dürfen seine äußere Geometrie nur um ca. 250mm unterschreiten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet height approx. 200 cm

description.en: The cabinet height must be approximately 200 cm.
description.original: Höhe ca. 200cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet depth approx. 60 cm

description.en: The cabinet depth must be approximately 60 cm.
description.original: Tiefe ca. 60cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet width 140 cm per bill of quantities

description.en: The cabinet width must be 140 cm as specified in the bill of quantities (LV).
description.original: Schrankbreite lt. LV-Angaben

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Arm length at least 6 meters

description.en: The extraction arm must have a minimum arm length of 6 meters.
description.original: Armlänge mind. 6 Meter

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture Construction

description.en: Requirements for the construction, assembly, and design of furniture bodies and understructures.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Back walls of roller bases as body panels

description.en: Back walls of roller bases must be executed like body panels.
description.original: Ausgenommen davon sind die Rückwände bei den Rollenunterbauten, welche wie Korpusplatten auszuführen sind

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Visible panels and sight screens manufactured like body parts

description.en: Sight panels, visible panels, and sight screens must be manufactured like body parts (i.e., with the same quality and finish as the cabinet bodies).
description.original: Sichtblenden sind wie Korpusteile herzustellen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 3-sided base design

description.en: The base must be designed as a 3-sided base.
description.original: 3-seitiger Sockel zu gestalten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Body height of understructures according to table height

description.en: The body height of understructures must be executed according to table height, with max 150mm height from floor to underside of tabletop for constructive features.
description.original: Korpushöhe der Unterbauten muss je nach Tischhöhe so ausgeführt werden, dass für konstruktive Merkmale max. 150mm der Höhe Fußboden Unterkante Tischplatte in Anspruch genommen werden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Height grid compatibility

description.en: The height grids of individual executions must be compatible with each other and with cabinet executions.
description.original: Höhenraster der einzelnen Ausführungen müssen in sich und zu den Schrankausführungen kompatibel sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Depth of understructures according to tabletop depth

description.en: The depth of understructures must correspond to the tabletop depth.
description.original: Tiefen der Unterbauten ergeben sich entsprechend der Tischplattentiefe

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer depth adjustment to avoid dead space

description.en: The depth of drawers must be adjusted to the understructure depth so that no dead space exists between drawer end and rear wall of understructure.
description.original: Tiefe der Schubladen ist der Unterbautiefe so anzupassen, dass kein Totraum zwischen Ende Schublade und hinterer Rückwand Unterbau gegeben ist

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Body construction from specified parts

description.en: The body must consist of 2 side panels, a lower bottom, 2 upper traverses, and height-adjustable shelves.
description.original: Der Korpus besteht aus 2 Seitenteilen, einem unteren Boden, 2 oberen Traversen und höhenverstellbaren Fachböden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Body parts permanently doweled and glued

description.en: Body parts must be permanently doweled and glued (non-detachable).
description.original: Korpusteile sind unlösbar zu verdübeln und zu verleimen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding for tall cabinets includes front and horizontal top panel

description.en: Cladding for tall cabinets must include a front panel and an additional horizontal top panel to create a closed, dust-protected area at the top.
description.original: Verblendungen bei Hochschränken beinhalten zusätzlich zur vorderen Blende eine waagrechte obere Blende, damit sich ein auch nach oben geschlossener verblendeter Bereich ergibt (Staubschutz).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hardware and Fittings

description.en: Requirements for hinges, handles, drawer slides, and other furniture hardware.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Edges with durable PP edge protection

description.en: Edges, especially visible edges, must be provided with permanently durable, through-colored PP edge protection. The PP edge protection should be impact-resistant, UV-resistant, and bond homogeneously and watertight with the panel via gluing or bonding. The thickness of the edge protection for visible edges should be at least 2mm.
description.original: Kanten, insbesondere Sichtkanten, sind mit dauerhaft haltbarem, durchgefärbten Kantenschutz aus PP zu versehen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal single-joint hinges for wooden furniture

description.en: For wooden furniture, single-joint hinges made of metal must be used.
description.original: Für Holzmöbel sind Eingelenk-Scharniere aus Metall zu verwenden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinge opening angle at least 270°

description.en: Hinges must have an opening angle of at least 270°.
description.original: Öffnungswinkel mindestens 270°

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges three-dimensionally adjustable

description.en: Hinges must be three-dimensionally adjustable.
description.original: Scharniere dreidimensional verstellbar

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hinges self-closing below 10° and holding closed

description.en: Hinges must be self-closing at an angle less than 10° and hold closed when in closed position.
description.original: bei einem Winkel kleiner 10 Grad selbstschließend und im geschlossenen Zustand zuhaltend ausgebildet

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Flap doors with impact dampers

description.en: Carcasses with flap doors must be equipped with impact dampers.
description.original: Weiters sind Korpuss e mit Anschlagdämpfern bei Flügeltüren auszustatten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Chemical cabinet hinges powder-coated, opening angle 270°

description.en: For chemical cabinets, hinges must be in standard powder-coated finish, opening angle 270°.
description.original: Für Chemikalienschränke sind Scharniere in normgerecht pulverlackbeschichteter Ausführung zu verwenden, Öffnungswinkel 270°

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Number of hinges per door based on height

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must have 2 hinges; doors over 900mm height must have 3 hinges.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe sind mit 2 Scharnieren, Türen über 900mm Höhe sind mit 3 Scharnieren auszustatten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Each door must have at least one handle element

description.en: Every cabinet door must be equipped with at least one handle element.
description.original: Jede Tür erhält mindestens ein Griffelement

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Opening angle 270° for doors

description.en: Doors must have an opening angle of 270°.
description.original: Öffnungswinkel 270°

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors up to 900mm with 2 hinges, over 900mm with 3 hinges

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must have 2 hinges; doors over 900mm height must have 3 hinges.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe sind mit 2 Scharnieren, Türen über 900mm Höhe sind mit 3 Scharnieren auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Door opening/closing via lockable lever handle with 2-point locking

description.en: Opening and closing of the doors must be via a lockable lever handle with 2-point locking.
description.original: Das Öffnen und Schliessen der Türen muss über einen versperrbaren Hebelgriff mit 2-Punkt-Verriegelung erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal bow handles (stainless steel) for doors

description.en: All doors must be executed with metal bow handles made of stainless steel, meeting cleaning requirements. Each door must have a handle element. Handle shells or continuous handle rails are not permitted for hygienic reasons.
description.original: Als Griffelemente der Möbel sind Metallbügelgriffe (Material Edelstahl), welche den Anforderungen der Reinigung entsprechen, zu verwenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Understructures with labeling fields

description.en: The understructures must be provided with labeling fields. The labeling fields consist of a holder into which a label can be inserted, covered with a fixed transparent film.
description.original: Die Unterbauten sind mit Beschriftungsfeldern zu versehen. Die Beschriftungsfelder bestehen aus einer Halterung, in die eine Kennzeichnung eingeschoben werden kann, die mit einer festen Klarsichtfolie abgedeckt wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Definitions for furniture fittings

description.en: Definitions for furniture fittings must be used.
description.original: Begriffe für Möbelbeschläge

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawer slides standards

description.en: Drawer slides must meet specified standards.
description.original: Auszugführungen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Locking Systems

description.en: Requirements for locks, keys, and locking mechanisms for doors and drawers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors and drawers lockable with cylinder locks and 3 keys each

description.en: Where required in the bill of quantities, doors and individual drawers must be lockable with cylinder locks, each with 3 own keys.
description.original: Soweit im LV gefordert, sind Türen und Einzelladen durch Zylinderschlösser mit je 3 Stk. Eigenschlüssel sperrbar zu machen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors up to 900mm with cylinder backset lock

description.en: Doors up to 900mm height must be equipped with a cylinder backset lock.
description.original: Türen bis 900mm Höhe mit Zylinder-Hinterlegschloss

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors over 900mm with cylinder object turn rod lock, left/right usable

description.en: Doors over 900mm height must have a cylinder object turn rod lock, usable on left and right; turn rod diameter 8mm, knob and cylinder replaceable.
description.original: Türen über 900mm Höhe mit Zylinder-Objekt-Drehstangen-Schloss, links und rechts einsetzbar; Drehstangen-Durchmesser 8mm, Drehknopf und Zylinder auswechselbar.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All lockable elements in one body with same key

description.en: If cabinets or drawers are lockable, all elements in one body must be lockable with the same key.
description.original: Werden Schränke oder Laden absperrbar ausgeführt, so sind sämtliche Elemente in einem Korpus mit dem gleichen Schlüssel sperrbar auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Possibility to retrofit locks later

description.en: It must be possible to retrofit locks on cabinets at a later time.
description.original: Es muss die Möglichkeit bestehen, Schränke auch zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt mit Schlössern nachzurüsten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Under-counter units with drawers can be centrally lockable

description.en: For under-counter units with drawers, locking can be central for all drawers.
description.original: Bei Unterbauten mit Laden kann die Versperrbarkeit zentral für alle Laden erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labeling and Identification

description.en: Requirements for labeling fields, stickers, and identification systems on furniture.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Possibility to attach interchangeable labels (cards, strips, etc.)

description.en: The possibility of attaching interchangeable labels (cards, strips, etc.) must be provided.
description.original: Die Möglichkeit der Anbringung von wechselbaren Beschriftungen (Kärtchen, Streifen, etc.) muss gegeben sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets and shelves must have labeling fields with holders and transparent covers

description.en: Cabinets and shelves must be provided with labeling fields consisting of a holder into which a label (e.g., paper strip) can be inserted and covered with a fixed transparent film.
description.original: Hängeschränke und Hängeregale sind mit Beschriftungsfeldern zu versehen. Die Beschriftungsfelder bestehen aus einer Halterung, in die eine Kennzeichnung eingeschoben werden kann, die mit einer festen Klarsichtfolie abgedeckt wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Labeling sticker for radioactive content

description.en: Each collection container must include a sticker for radioactive marking.
description.original: inkl. Aufkleber zur Kennzeichnung – Radioaktiv.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Color coding and labeling per DIN EN 13792

description.en: Color coding and labeling must be according to DIN EN 13792.
description.original: Farbkennzeichnung und Beschriftung nach DIN EN 13792.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas type label

description.en: The station must include a gas type label.
description.original: Gasartenschild

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal Construction and Finishing

description.en: Requirements for metal frames, profiles, welding, surface treatment, and coating.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Metal construction from standard formed, coated tubes or profiles

description.en: Metal constructions must be made from commercially standard formed, coated metal tubes or support profiles.
description.original: Metallkonstruktionen sind aus handelsüblich geformten, normgerecht beschichteten Metallrohren bzw. Trägerprofilen herzustellen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Visible ends sealed with matching caps

description.en: Visible ends must be tightly sealed with caps that optically match the equipment.
description.original: Sichtbare Enden sind durch optisch der Einrichtung entsprechende Kappen dicht zu verschließen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cross-sections and material thicknesses suitable for typical lab loads

description.en: Cross-sections and material thicknesses must correspond to the usual loads of a laboratory operation.
description.original: Die Querschnitte und Materialstärken müssen den üblichen Belastungen eines Laborbetriebs entsprechen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Surface protection via sandblasting or chemical degreasing and powder coating with average thickness 80 μm

description.en: Surface protection of steel parts must be achieved by sandblasting or chemical degreasing, with powder coating (epoxy-polyester mixed powder) thermally cured. The average coating thickness must be 80 μm.
description.original: Der Oberflächenschutz der Stahlteile ist durch Sandstrahlen oder chem. Entfettung, mit Pulverbeschichtung (Epoxy-Polyester Mischpulver) thermisch gehärtet zu realisieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Surface sanded on both sides and treated with paraffin oil

description.en: The surface must be sanded on both sides and treated with paraffin oil.
description.original: Die Oberfläche ist beidseitig geschliffen und mit Paraffinöl eingelassen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Visible surfaces of stainless steel fittings plastic-coated

description.en: Visible surfaces of stainless steel fittings must be provided with a plastic coating as per general description.
description.original: Die im sichtbaren Bereich befindlichen Oberflächen sind wie unter "Allgemeine Beschreibung" mit einer Kunststoffbeschichtung zu versehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Full coating of support frames with powder coating RAL 7004 or similar

description.en: The support frames must be fully coated with epoxy resin powder coating in grey RAL 7004 or similar.
description.original: Die Traggestelle sind vollständig zu beschichten (siehe oben).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All butt joints must be welded and ground smooth

description.en: All butt joints must be welded and ground cleanly.
description.original: Alle Stoßverbindungen sind zu verschweißen und sauber zu verschleifen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Deburring of sharp edges and corners

description.en: Sharp profile or sheet metal edges, drill hole edges, and outer corners must be deburred. Spot welds are not permitted.
description.original: Scharfe Profil- oder Blechkanten, Bohrlochränder und Außenecken sind zu entgraten (gepunktete Schweißverbindungen sind nicht zulässig).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tables and Workstations

description.en: Requirements for tables, workstations, frames, tabletops, and associated components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Uniform basic grid of 150 mm with grid-based layout

description.en: The uniform basic grid must be 150 mm. Modules must be offered in multiples of this grid: 300, 450, 600, 900, 1200, 1500, and 1800 mm. Unless otherwise specified in the bill of quantities, a layout based on this grid must be chosen, with superstructures and substructures generally following the same grid.
description.original: Das einheitliche Grundraster beträgt 150mm. Entsprechend sind die Module im Vielfachen dieses Rastermaßes anzubieten; also 300, 450, 600, 900, 1200, 1500 und 1800mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Consideration of natural dimensions

description.en: Natural dimensions must be taken into account.
description.original: Auf Naturmaße ist Bedacht zu nehmen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Grid alignment for superstructure and substructure

description.en: The superstructure and substructure must generally follow the same grid pattern, with consideration for natural dimensions.
description.original: Ober- und Unterbauten grundsätzlich im gleichen Raster folgen sollen. Auf Naturmaße ist Bedacht zu nehmen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Support frame definition

description.en: Support frames are all parts that serve the stable construction of work tables.
description.original: Als Traggestelle werden alle Teile bezeichnet, die der stabilen Bauweise von Arbeitstischen dienen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Table types defined

description.en: Laboratory tables are all work surfaces that can be used as wall-mounted, freestanding, or central tables.
description.original: Als Labortische werden alle Arbeitsflächen bezeichnet, die entweder wandstehend, freistehend oder als Mitteltische nutzbar sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tables must be built on suitable frames

description.en: Tables must generally be built on suitable frames.
description.original: Grundsätzlich sind Tische auf geeigneten Gestellen aufzubauen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work height for standing workplaces: 900mm

description.en: Work heights must be 900mm for standing workplaces.
description.original: Die Arbeitshöhen sind mit 900mm für Steharbeitsplätze einzuhalten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Work height for sitting workplaces: 720-750mm

description.en: Work heights must be 720-750mm for sitting workplaces.
description.original: bzw. mit 720-750mm für Sitzarbeitsplätze einzuhalten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Special tables with other heights per specification

description.en: Special tables with other heights are derived from the performance specification.
description.original: Sondertische mit anderen Höhenmaßen ergeben sich aus der Leistungsbeschreibung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Frames made of metal profiles (steel/aluminum)

description.en: Frames are made of metal profiles (steel/aluminum), with system-compliant standard holes and connection options, and different shapes depending on use.
description.original: Sie sind aus Metallprofilen (Stahl / Aluminium) gefertigt, verfügen über systemgerechte Normbohrungen und Verbindungsmöglichkeiten, und haben je nach Einsatz unterschiedliche Form.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Writing workplaces with C-foot frames

description.en: Writing workplaces are generally to be equipped with C-foot frames.
description.original: Schreibarbeitsplätze sind generell mit C-Fußgestellen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Workstations/tables with four-leg frames and associated structural components

description.en: Workstations or tables must have four-leg frames. The upright elements must include an upper cross connection with holes for tabletop fastening, fastening elements for longitudinal traverses, and locking screws. Longitudinal traverses must be manufactured at the top front and top back. An additional cross traverse must be implemented at the lower back area. Stop brackets must be installed at the upper back for roll-in substructures to ensure a uniform front appearance of the tables. All frames must be equipped with leveling devices that serve to bear weight and compensate for floor unevenness. The support frames must be designed so that at the prescribed load capacity, the number of upright elements is minimized to allow high flexibility in the arrangement of under-counter cabinets.
description.original: Arbeitsplätze bzw. Tische mit Vier-Fußgestellen aus zuführen. Die Standelemente sind mit oberer Querverbindung einschließlich Bohrungen für Tischplattenbefestigung, Befestigungselementen für Längstraversen und Sicherungsschrauben zu versehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum load capacity of support frame 200 kg

description.en: The load capacity of the support frame must be at least 200 kg.
description.original: Tragfähigkeit des Traggestells mind. 200kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Minimum load capacity of mobile work table 150 kg

description.en: The load capacity of the mobile work table must be at least 150 kg.
description.original: Tragfähigkeit des Arbeitstisches mind. 150kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf surface load capacity 30 kg

description.en: The surface load capacity of all shelves must be at least 30 kg per shelf.
description.original: Flächentragfähigkeit aller Fachböden beträgt mindestens 30kg

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shelf support/bracket/carrier minimum load capacity 50 kg

description.en: Each shelf support, bracket, or carrier must have a minimum load capacity of 50 kg.
description.original: Die Belastbarkeit eines jeden Fachbodenträgers ist mindestens 50kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drawers minimum load capacity 30 kg

description.en: Drawers or pull-outs must have a minimum load capacity of approximately 30 kg. Deviating load capacities are explicitly mentioned in the individual text.
description.original: Auszüge oder Schubladen besitzen eine Belastbarkeit von minimal ca. 30kg. Abweichende Belastbarkeiten sind explizit im Einzeltext erwähnt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plate thickness sufficient for safe placement of specified devices

description.en: The plate thickness must be dimensioned so that the specified devices can be safely placed on it; if necessary, frame constructions must be included.
description.original: Die Plattenstärke ist so zu bemessen, dass die angeführten Geräte sicher darauf aufgestellt werden können, ggf. erforderliche Rahmenkonstruktionen sind in den Positionen Übertrag EUR Planungsgruppe Grünbichler GmbH, Wienerstraße 45a, 8605 Kapfenberg, +43 (3862) 28088 Seite 22 von 409

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Boom with 50 kg load capacity

description.en: The boom must have a load capacity of 50 kg.
description.original: Ausleger mit 50kg Tragkraft

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Mobile work tables with 4 double swivel casters, stable steel frame, and specific caster specifications

description.en: The mobile work table must be on 4 double swivel casters, have a stable support structure made of a completely welded 4-leg steel frame including 3 lower traverses, and have 4 polyamide plain-bearing double casters (approx. 80 mm diameter) with polyurethane tread, 2 lockable, load capacity per caster at least 110 kg.
description.original: Mobile Arbeitstische: Mobile Arbeitstische auf 4 Stk. Doppellenkrollen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop material as per tabletop position

description.en: The tabletop material must be as specified in the 'Tabletop' position (reference to another section).
description.original: Tischplatte (Material entsprechend Position "Tischplatte" bzw.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Vertical cladding for height differences made of tabletop material

description.en: For height differences, a vertical cladding made of tabletop material must be provided; this is not separately listed in the performance description.
description.original: Höhensprüngen ist eine senkrechte Verblendung aus Tischplattenmaterial vorzusehen, diese ist in der Leistungsbeschreibung nicht extra ausgewiesen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Standard tabletops: melamine resin laminate boards with detailed specifications

description.en: Standard tabletops must be melamine resin laminate boards consisting of a carrier board (approx. 28 mm thick flat press board per DIN 68 761), glue V20, emission class E1. The work surface must be covered with at least 0.8 mm high-pressure laminate (HPL). The side and front edges must be covered with approx. 3 mm thick polypropylene. The corners of the tabletops must be rounded to a 3 mm radius. The rear longitudinal edge (only in combination with sealing to media carriers) must be finished with a 0.4 mm melamine resin edge. The underside must be provided with at least 0.03 mm synthetic resin foil. The top and bottom must be water and heat resistant and glued to the carrier board.
description.original: Standardtischplatten: Melaminharz-Schichtplatten bestehen aus einer Trägerplatte (ca. 28mm dicke Flachpressplatte nach DIN 68 761), Verleimung V20, Emissionsklasse E1.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Special tabletops: polypropylene boards with detailed specifications

description.en: For special applications, tabletops must be made of polypropylene with a chipboard carrier board approx. 25 mm thick. The work surface covering and edge edging must be approx. 6 mm thick PP, welded and glued to the base plate with special adhesive and adhesion promoter. The edge profile must be flush or with a bead edge and formed as a drip nose on the underside. The underside of the base plate must be executed with a melamine resin coated backing material to protect against moisture. Corner formations must be welded, and all welds must be ground smooth on the surface.
description.original: Tischplatten für besondere Anwendungsbereiche: Platten aus Polypropylen: Die Tischplatten bestehen aus einer Spanplatten-Trägerplatte, ca. 25mm dick.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware tabletop 1.20 lfm, view A

description.en: Provide a stoneware tabletop, 1.20 linear meters, view A.
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug, Ansicht A, LM 1,20

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Phenolic resin solid core tabletop 4.80 lfm, view A

description.en: One 4.80 lfm phenolic resin solid core tabletop for view A.
description.original: Tischplatte Phenolharz-Vollkern Ansicht A

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware tabletop 5.10 lfm, views B and C

description.en: One 5.10 lfm stoneware tabletop for views B and C (central workbench).
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug Ansicht B&C (Mittelarbeitszeile)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Stoneware tabletop 7.70 lfm, views A and B

description.en: Provide a stoneware tabletop of 7.70 lfm, as per views A and B.
description.original: Tischplatte Steinzeug 7,70 LO Ansicht A, B

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Polyurethane castors, 2 lockable, min 110 kg load capacity per castor

description.en: The worktable on castors must have polyurethane castors, with 2 lockable castors, and a minimum load capacity of 110 kg per castor.
description.original: mit Polyurethan- Bereifung, 2 Rollen feststellbar, Tragkraft pro Rolle mind. 110kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop material per 'Tischplatte' item or plan specifications

description.en: The tabletop material must be as specified in the 'Tischplatte' item or according to the plans.
description.original: Tischplatte (Material entsprechend Position "Tischplatte" bzw. lt. Angaben in den Plänen)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop made of solid beech wood, 30 mm thick, from approx. 50 mm wide strips finger-jointed and glued

description.en: Tabletop must be made of solid beech wood: solid beech wood panels from approx. 50 mm wide strips, finger-jointed and glued, with a thickness of 30 mm.
description.original: Tischplatte aus Buche - massiv: Buchemassivholzplatten aus ca. 50 mm breiten Riemen, keilverzinkt verleimt, mit einer Dicke von 30 mm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Tabletop mounted on two continuous metal traverses

description.en: The tabletop must be mounted on two continuous metal traverses.
description.original: auf zwei durchgehenden Metalltraversen montiert.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Worktable without castors: level-adjustable, fully welded four-leg steel frame

description.en: The worktable without castors must have a level-adjustable four-leg frame that is a stable support structure made of a completely welded four-leg steel frame.
description.original: Arbeitstisch (ohne Rollen): Arbeitstisch auf nivellierbarem Vier-Fußgestell.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Worktable without castors: min load capacity 150 kg

description.en: The worktable without castors must have a minimum load capacity of 150 kg.
description.original: Tragfähigkeit des Arbeitstisches mind. 150kg.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media Supply Systems

description.en: Requirements for media cells, wings, outlets, and related supply infrastructure.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells as modular, floor-standing energy supply units

description.en: Media cells (energy cells) must be wall-standing or freestanding modules designed as floor-standing energy supply and disposal units in modular form. They consist of various combinable assemblies, made of metal (steel/aluminum) upright profiles (height approx. 250 cm, appropriate cross-section) with a coated finish. They must be structurally designed for later expansion, modification, or removal by the operator. They are suitable for mounting fittings, media channels, and variable assembly of shelves, wall cabinets, tabletops, and accessories. They are used for horizontal piping in the under-bench area, with height adjustable to table height. The stands include a media support grid for fixing media base pipes and a stand foot element. Above the tabletop, the cell stands accommodate media panel (splash guard below media channel), media channel, splash guard above media channel, shelves, wall cabinets, and stand extensions up to ceiling anchorage. Media cells must be equipped with removable (possibly sliding) front panels; for freestanding modules, removable panels on both sides. They must also have laterally sliding media covers in the under-bench area.
description.original: Medienzellen (Energiezellen) sind wandstehende oder freistehende Module, die der Aufnahme von Medienleitungen bzw. dem Hinter- oder Zwischenbau von Arbeitstischen dienen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell for wall workbench: modular design with expansion possibility

description.en: Media cell for wall workbench: analogous to above, with possibility for expansion for superstructures. Modular design. Quantity to be stated in the bill of quantities in linear meters.
description.original: Medienzelle für Wandarbeitstisch: Analog zu oben, Möglichkeit zur Erweiterung für Aufbauten. Modularer Aufbau. Angabe im LV in laufmeterspezifischer Stückzahl.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cell for double workbench: modular design, splitting not required but possible

description.en: Media cell for double workbench: analogous to above. Splitting into two separate media cells is not required. If subsequent splitting into two separate wall workbench rows is needed, it is indicated in individual items (execution with two separate media cells). Modular design.
description.original: Medienzelle für Doppelarbeitstisch: Analog zu oben. Grundsätzlich ist eine Teilung in zwei getrennte Medienzellen nicht gefordert. Soll die Möglichkeit zur nachträglichen Teilung in zwei separate Wandarbeitszeilen erforderlich sein, so ist dies bei den einzelnen Positionen angeführt (Ausführung mit zwei getrennten Medienzellen). Modularer Aufbau.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells can be installed individually or in a row

description.en: The media cells must be capable of being installed either individually or in a row.
description.original: Medienzellen sollen einzeln oder in Reihe verbaut werden können

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Leveling foot elements to compensate floor skirting edge

description.en: The leveling foot elements must be designed to compensate for the floor skirting edge.
description.original: Die nivellierbaren Fußelemente sind so zu gestalten, dass die Fußbodensockelkante ausgeglichen werden kann.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lower part of cell stand with detachable mechanical locking

description.en: The lower part of the cell stand must be designed to provide a detachable mechanical locking of the support structures of the table in front.
description.original: Der untere Teil des Zellenständers ist ebenfalls so auszubilden, dass eine lösbare mechanische Arretierung der Tragestrukturen des davorstehenden Tisches gegeben ist.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fixed mounted base at same height as other furniture

description.en: A fixed mounted base at the same height as the other furniture must be provided towards the floor.
description.original: Zum Fußboden hin ist ein fix montierter Sockel in gleicher Höhe der sonstigen Möbel vorzusehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Execution of cladding for fixed steel table frames

description.en: The cladding for fixed steel table frames must be executed consisting of approximately... (text cut off).
description.original: Ausführung der Verblendungen bei fest angebauten Stahltischgestellen bestehend aus einem ca.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cladding above work surfaces up to at least the height of the media channel or lowest shelf

description.en: Above work surfaces, media cells must be clad at least up to the height of the media channel (or the lowest shelf).
description.original: Oberhalb der Arbeitsflächen sind Medienzellen mindestens bis zur Höhe des Medienkanals (bzw. des untersten Tablars) zu verblenden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Upper horizontal cladding to wall in sink area

description.en: In the sink area, an upper horizontal cladding to the wall must be executed.
description.original: In diesem Bereich ist eine obere waagrechte Verblendung zur Wand auszuführen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media outlets must be mountable in large numbers, in any arrangement, and easily accessible

description.en: Media outlets must be mountable in large numbers and in any arrangement, and must be easily accessible.
description.original: Medienauslässe sollen in großer Anzahl und in beliebiger Anordnung montierbar und leicht zugänglich sein

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Arrangement of gas and liquid extraction points in media cell cladding is permitted

description.en: The arrangement of extraction points for gases and liquids in the media cell cladding is permitted.
description.original: Die Anordnung von Entnahmestellen für Gase und Flüssigkeiten in der Medienzellenblende ist zulässig

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No sockets for power and low current (230V, 400V, IT) in media cell cladding

description.en: Sockets for power and low current (230V, 400V, IT) are not permitted in the media cell cladding.
description.original: nicht jedoch Steckdosen für Stark- und Schwachstrom (230V, 400V, EDV)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media cells in sink areas of wall work rows only up to top edge of media channel

description.en: In the area of sinks in wall work rows, media cells must only be executed up to the height of the top edge of the media channel.
description.original: Im Bereich von Spülen in Wandarbeitszeilen sind die Medienzellen nur bis zur Höhe „Oberkante - Medienkanal“ auszuführen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Modular construction of media supply systems

description.en: Media supply systems must have a modular construction.
description.original: Modularer Aufbau.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wing [B, C] with 12x 230V, 1x 400V/16A, 2x DD RJ45, prepared for utilities

description.en: Provide media wings (types B, C) with 12x 230V sockets, 1x 400V/16A socket, 2x DD RJ45 outlets, prepared for 1x each of cooling water supply and return (including cooling water fittings), compressed air, nitrogen, argon, oxygen, and drainage via pump module.
description.original: [B, C], inkl. 12x 230V, 1x 400V/16A, 2x DD RJ45, vorbereitet für je 1x KüW-VL, KüW-RL (inkl. KüW-Armaturen), 1x DL, 1x N2, 1x Ar, 1x O2, Entwässerung über Medienflügel (Pumpmodul).

description.original: [E], bestehend aus: Medienzelle 2,8lfm für KW, 1x N2, 1x Ar, 1x O2, 1x DL Medienkanal 2,8lfm inkl. 6x 230V, 1x DD RJ45 Glastablar 2,8lfm

description.en: Provide 2.40 lfm of media wing [F] including 15x 230V, 3x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A, 1x 230V/32A, 1x DD RJ45, prepared for 2x nitrogen, 2x argon, 1x compressed air, and also 1x each of CO2, NH3, Ar-CH4, Ar-CO2, Ar-H2.
description.original: [F], inkl. 15x 230V, 3x 400V/16A, 1x 400V/32A, 1x 230V/32A, 1x DD RJ45, vorbereitet für 2x N2, 2x Ar, 1x DL, weiters je 1x CO2, NH3, Ar-CH4, Ar-CO2, Ar-H2
