deliverableArray.bulletPoint: VE-water installation with TÜV-approved system, no metal parts in contact with medium

description.en: The deionized (VE) water installation must use a TÜV-approved system with pipes (material per subsequent item) according to DIN 16892 and push-fit connectors or welded, completely without metal parts in contact with the medium.
description.original: VE-Wasser- Installation mit TÜV- geprüftem Installati onssystem bestehend aus Rohren (Material siehe Folgeposition) nach DIN 16 892 und Steckverbindern, bzw. geschweißt vollständig oh ne medienberührte Metallteile.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Disposal lines material per subsequent item

description.en: The material for disposal lines must be as specified in the subsequent item.
description.original: Entsorgungsleitungen: Material siehe nachfolgende Position.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All drains equipped with PP odor traps with easy cleaning access

description.en: All drains, including funnel basins, must be equipped with odor traps. The odor traps for basin drains must be made of polypropylene (PP) and have an easily openable cleaning access.
description.original: Alle Abläufe (auch Trichterbecken) sind mit Geruchsverschlüssen auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Disposal pipe ends with smooth pipe end min NW50

description.en: The disposal pipe must end with a smooth pipe end, dimension according to basin count, minimum NW50.
description.original: Bauseits endet die Entsorgungsleitung mit einem glatten Rohrende, Dimension entsprechend der Beckenanzahl, mit mind. NW50.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Wastewater connection height max 30cm above FFBOK

description.en: The height of wastewater connection points (e.g., for autoclaves) in the media cell must not exceed 30 cm above the finished floor level (FFBOK).
description.original: Die Höhe der Abwasseranschlussstellen (z.B. für Autoklaven) in der Medienzelle dürfen nicht höher als 30cm über der FFBOK liegen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Horizontal supply lines dimensioned per number of outlets

description.en: Horizontal supply lines must be dimensioned according to standards based on the number of media outlets.
description.original: Die horizontalen Versorgungsleitungen sind je nach Anzahl der Medienauslässe normgerecht zu dimensionieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Splash Guards and Drip Trays

description.en: Specifications for splash guards, drip trays, and drip racks.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Splash guard for double work cells with front sinks

description.en: Front sinks on double work cells must be equipped with a splash guard. The splash guard must have a height of 600 mm measured from the top edge of the work surface, and must be executed as shown in the plans. It must consist of an OSB carrier board with a minimum thickness of 19 mm (including coating), glue class V20, and emission class E1. The OSB board must be coated on both sides with a minimum thickness of 0.14 mm. The visible longitudinal edges must be covered with 3 mm thick polypropylene, and the corners must be rounded to a radius of 3 mm. The bottom longitudinal edge (resting on the table top) must be covered with a melamine edge band of at least 0.4 mm thickness.
description.original: Stirnspülen an Doppelarbeitszeilen sind mit einem Spritzschutz auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Splash guard via media cell cladding for sinks in wall work rows

description.en: For sinks in wall work rows, the splash guard is realized by the cladding of the media cell up to the height of the upper edge of the media channel.
description.original: Bei Spülen in Wandarbeitszeilen wird der Spritzschutz durch die Verblendung der Medienzelle realisiert (bis Höhe „Oberkante – Medienkanal“).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Side wall splash guard if sink base is close to wall

description.en: If the sink base is less than or equal to 50cm from the wall, a splash guard must also be mounted on the side wall.
description.original: falls Spülbecken seitlich an Wände angrenzen (Abstand Spülenunterbau zur Wand kleiner-gleich 50cm), so ist ein Spritzschutz auch an der Seitenwand zu montieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Splash guard made of ESG glass, min. 7mm thick

description.en: Splash guards made of tempered safety glass (ESG) must be provided for all wall work tables, possibly on both sides depending on basin location. Material: ESG, thickness at least 7mm, all edges must be broken. Suitable attachment to table top and/or media cell cladding, variably adjustable. Height up to underside of media channel, ending 20mm before the front edge of the table top. The upper front corner must be generously rounded or broken to achieve an aesthetically pleasing solution and avoid injury risk.
description.original: Spritzschutz aus ESG: Diese sind bei allen Wandarbeitstischen (ggf. Je nach Lage des Beckens beidseitig) vorzusehen - Material ESG, Stärke mind. 7mm, sämtliche Kanten sind gebrochen auszuführen. ... Höhe bis Unterkante Medienkanal, im vorderen Bereich 20mm vor der Tischplattenkante endend. ... obere vordere Ecke großzügig abzurunden oder zu brechen, sodass einerseits eine optisch ansprechende Lösung erreicht wird, und andererseits keine Verletzungsgefahr besteht.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip tray integrated into table top with drain to sink

description.en: A drip tray must be integrated into the table top, with a drain leading into the sink basin.
description.original: Abtropftasse in Platte integriert: In die Tischplatte integriert, mit Ablauf in das Spülbecken ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip rack made of polypropylene

description.en: The drip rack must be made of polypropylene.
description.original: Tropfrechen: Hergestellt aus Polypropylen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip rack with drip channel and drain hose, attached via base plate

description.en: The drip rack must include a drip channel and a drain hose (into the basin), and be attached via a base plate to the energy cell or, for central work tables, over the front sink as per the bill of quantities requirements.
description.original: Abtropfgestell mit Abtropfrinne und Ablaufschlauch (in Becken), welches je nach den Erfordernissen des Leistungsverzeichnisses an die Energiezeile bzw. bei Mittelarbeitstischen über der Stirnspüle mittels Grundplatte befestigt wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip rack with pins of various lengths and thicknesses

description.en: The drip rack itself must be made with pins of various lengths and thicknesses.
description.original: Der Abtropfrechen selbst ist mit verschiedenen langen und dicken Zapfen auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip rack minimum width 60cm, minimum height 40cm

description.en: The drip rack must have a minimum width of 60cm and a minimum height of 40cm.
description.original: Breite mind. 60cm, Höhe mind. 40cm.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture and Cabinet Details

description.en: Specifications for furniture details, cabinet features, and adaptations.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Round corners to 3mm radius

description.en: All corners must be rounded to a radius of 3mm.
description.original: Ecken sind auf 3mm Radius zu runden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Bottom longitudinal edge with melamine edge banding

description.en: The lower longitudinal edge resting on the tabletop must be covered with a melamine edge banding of at least 0.4mm.
description.original: Die untere (auf der Tischplatte aufliegende) Längskante ist mit einer mind. 0,4mm Melaminharzkante zu belegen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors lockable

description.en: Doors must be lockable.
description.original: Türen versperrbar

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Doors with hold-open device

description.en: Doors must be equipped with a hold-open device.
description.original: Türen mit Feststellanlage

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ventilated cabinet with height-adjustable shelves and drip tray

description.en: Cabinet must be ventilated, with bowl-shaped, height-adjustable shelves secured against accidental pulling out, and a drip tray.
description.original: Belüfteter Schrank mit schalenförmigen, höhenverstellbaren, gegen unbeabsichtigtes Herausziehen gesicherten Einlegeböden und Auffangwanne

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets with hinged doors

description.en: Cabinets must have hinged doors.
description.original: Schränke mit Flügeltüren

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets with drawers where specified

description.en: Where indicated in the performance description, cabinets must be supplied with drawers.
description.original: Ggf. sind diese Schränke mit Schubladen zu liefern (siehe Leistungsbeschreibung)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Under-sink cabinet adapted for containers

description.en: Under-sink cabinet elements for holding containers must be adapted to these requirements.
description.original: Unterschrankelemente, welche zur Aufnahme dieser Behälter dienen, sind an diese Anforderungen entsprechend anzupassen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lead lining of under-sink cabinet (min. 0.5 mm)

description.en: Under-sink cabinet elements must be equipped with all-sided lead lining of at least 0.5 mm thickness.
description.original: mit einer allseitigen Bleiauskleidung (mind. 0,5mm) auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lockable drawers and doors (if specified)

description.en: If specified in the bill of quantities, individual drawers and doors must be lockable.
description.original: Falls im LV angegeben sind einzelne Laden und Türen absperrbar auszuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Adaptation of supporting frame for non-standard space

description.en: Adaptations of the supporting frame may be required because standard frame space is not always available.
description.original: Adaptierungen des tragenden Gestells erforderlich sein können, da der Platzbedarf für das Standardgestell nicht immer vorhanden ist

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ensure maximum concealment of media cell

description.en: Maximum concealment of the media cell must be ensured.
description.original: weitestgehende Verblendung der Medienzelle gewährleistet sein muss

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Safety and Fire Protection

description.en: Specifications for fire safety, safety cabinets, and safety equipment.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fire resistance class FWF 90 and building material class B1

description.en: Safety cabinets must have fire resistance class FWF 90 and building material class B1.
description.original: Feuerwiderstandsklasse FWF 90, Baustoffklasse B1

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Door edges and locks with flame barriers

description.en: Door edges and locking mechanisms must be equipped with flame barriers.
description.original: Türkanten und Verriegelungen mit Flammsperren

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Insulation fire class B1, thermal conductivity 0.040 W/mK

description.en: The insulation must correspond to fire protection class B1 (flame retardant) and have a thermal conductivity of 0.040 W/mK.
description.original: entsprechen der Brandschutzklasse B1, schwerentflammbar, Wärmeleit fähigkeit 0,040 W/mK.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Thermal monitoring

description.en: Cabinets must have thermal monitoring.
description.original: Thermoüberwachung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Under-bench safety cabinets for flammable materials

description.en: Where specified in the bill of quantities and plans, safety cabinets for storing flammable solids, liquids, and solvents must be executed as under-bench cabinets. Under-bench safety cabinets must have equipment and requirements analogous to those specified above (fire resistance, insulation, etc.).
description.original: Tisch-Unterbau-Sicherheitsschrank: Dort wo im Leistungsverzeichnis und in den Plänen angegeben, sollen Sicherheitsschränke zur Aufbewahrung von feuergefährlichen festen und flüssigen Stoffen und Lösungsmitteln als Tischunterbau ausgeführt werden

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Safety high cabinet as table base for hazardous substances

description.en: The safety high cabinet must be designed as a table base for hazardous solid and liquid substances and solvents. It must comply with DIN 12925 for proper storage of hazardous substances in workrooms. The cabinet must be equipped with adjustment aids to compensate for floor unevenness, have a grounding connection, and be marked according to EN 14470-1. Further requirements are analogous to those specified above. The interior must have at least 4 height-adjustable shelves with a load capacity of at least 70 kg each and a grid spacing of approx. 32 mm. The cabinet must include a removable floor spill tray. The swing doors must have an opening angle of at least 90° for full interior visibility, must close automatically in the event of a fire, and must be equipped with a locking device to secure the doors in an open position.
description.original: Sicherheits-Hochschrank als Tischunterbau für gefährliche feste und flüssige Stoffe und Lösungsmittel

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Safety cabinets for acids and alkalis: underbench or tall

description.en: Safety cabinets for storing acids and alkalis must be designed as underbench or tall cabinets for safe storage of aggressive, non-flammable hazardous substances in workrooms. They must ensure safe separate storage of acids and alkalis via two hermetically separated storage chambers. The safety cabinets must be designed to be lockable and must include a floor spill tray (catch basin).
description.original: SICHERHEITSSCHRÄNKE ZUR AUFBEWAHRUNG VON SÄUREN UND LAUGEN Ausführung als Unterbau- bzw. Hochschränke zur sicheren Lagerung aggressiver, nicht entzündbarer Gefahrenstoffe in Arbeitsräumen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with standard 12 925 for safety cabinets for laboratories

description.en: The tender requires compliance with standard 12 925 for safety cabinets for laboratories.
description.original: 12 925 Sicherheitsschränke für Laboratorien

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet as solvent cabinet under fume hood

description.en: One safety/hazardous material cabinet (Gefahrenstoffschrank) as a solvent cabinet, installed under the fume hood, with 2 pull-out drawers (1/3 to 2/3 division) including a second pull-out level and drip trays, width 140 cm, quantity 1.
description.original: Gefahrenstoffschrank GU.07.16.01.01, Ausführung als Lösemittelschrank, im Unterbau des Digestoriums. 2 Stk. Auszugsladen (Teilung 1/3 zu 2/3). Breite 140 cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet for acids and bases under fume hood

description.en: One safety cabinet for acids and bases (Säure- und Laugenschrank) under the fume hood, with two wing doors, second pull-out level including drip trays, width 140 cm, quantity 1.
description.original: Gefahrenstoffschrank GU.09.16.01.01, Ausführung als Säure- und Laugenschrank, im Unterbau des Digestoriums. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, inkl. zweiter Auszugsebene (inkl. Auffangwannen). Breite 140cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Safety/hazardous material cabinet (G2.32.16)

description.en: Provide a safety cabinet for hazardous materials, designed as a solvent high cabinet with 2 wing doors, 4 shelves, and a floor drip tray, width 90 cm.
description.original: G2.32.16 Sicherheits- bzw. Gefahrenstoffschränke Gefahrenstoffschrank ... Ausführung als Lösemittel-Hochschrank. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, 4 Stk. Fachböden, Bodenauffangwanne. Breite 90cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet for acids and bases

description.en: Two hazardous material cabinets for acids and bases, under fume hood, with double doors, second pull-out level including drip trays, width 140cm.
description.original: Ausführung als Säure- und Laugenschrank im Unterbau des Digestoriums. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, inkl. zweiter Auszugsebene (inkl. Auffangwannen). Breite 140cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet for solvents

description.en: One hazardous material cabinet for solvents, tall type, with double doors, 4 shelves, floor drip tray, width 90cm.
description.original: Ausführung als Lösemittel-Hochschrank. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, 4 Stk. Fachböden, Bodenauffangwanne. Breite 90cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet for acids and alkalis

description.en: Safety cabinet for acids and alkalis, under fume hood, with double doors and second pull-out level including drip trays, width 140 cm. Quantity varies by location: 1 cabinet (general), 2 cabinets in locations A and E, and 1 cabinet in unspecified location.
description.original: Ausführung als Säuren- und Laugenschrank, im Unterbau des Digestoriums. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, inkl. zweiter Auszugsebene (inkl. Auffangwannen). Breite 140cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material cabinet for solvents under fume hood

description.en: Safety cabinet for solvents, under fume hood, with two pull-out drawers (1/3 to 2/3 division), width 140 cm. Quantity: 3 cabinets in locations B, C, E, plus additional cabinets as specified.
description.original: Ausführung als Lösemittelschrank, im Unterbau des Digetoriums. 2 Stk. Auszugsladen (Teilung 1/3 zu 2/3). Breite 140cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hazardous material storage cabinet (general)

description.en: Provide one hazardous material storage cabinet. Hazardous material storage cabinet must be provided.
description.original: Gefahrenstoffschrank

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gefahrenstoffschrank als Säure- und Laugenschrank

description.en: Hazardous material cabinet for acids and alkalis, under digestorium, 2 wing doors, second pull-out level with catch basins, width 140 cm, quantity 1.
description.original: Gefahrenstoffschrank G4.12.16.01.01, Ausführung als Säure- und Laugenschrank, im Unterbau des Digestoriums. 2 Stk. Flügeltüren, inkl. zweiter Auszugsebene (inkl. Auffangwannen). Breite 140cm

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Eye shower per EN 15154

description.en: Eye shower must comply with EN 15154, single-hand, for table or wall mounting, located near the built-in sink.
description.original: Augendusche nach EN 15154: Einhand-Augendusche für Tisch- oder Wandmontage. Situierung im Bereich der Einbauspüle.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hose length min 1.5m for body shower use

description.en: The hose length must be at least 1.5 m so that the shower head can be used as a body shower if needed.
description.original: Länge des Schlauches so bemessen, dass Duschkopf notfalls als Körperdusche verwendet werden kann (Schlauchlänge mind. 1,5m).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shower hose length at least 1.5 m

description.en: The shower hose must be dimensioned so that the shower head can be used as a body shower if necessary, with a minimum hose length of 1.5 m.
description.original: Schlauchlänge mind. 1,5m

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Interior and Waste Management

description.en: Specifications for interior equipment, waste separation, and sludge traps.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Interior with shelf pull-outs as per performance definition

description.en: The interior of the safety cabinets must include shelf pull-outs, or as defined in the performance specification.
description.original: Innenausstattung mit Tablarauszügen, bzw. wie in der Leistungsaufstellung definiert

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Waste separation system in underbench

description.en: A waste separation system must be provided in the underbench for disposal of residual solids and household waste from laboratory work. It must be executed as a waste collector with full extension and hanging collection containers, with high pull-out and hanging containers. The waste collector must have a capacity of 2 x 30 liters, regardless of undercounter units. Waste containers and boxes must be standard commercial products, and the specified volumes must be adhered to.
description.original: Mülltrennsystem im Unterbau Zur Entsorgung von Restmengen an Feststoffen und von Hausmüll bei Laborarbeiten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sludge trap (gypsum separator) for rock saw

description.en: Provide a sludge trap (gypsum separator) for the rock saw, e.g., BOTZ TA 1 03 clay separator (dimensions BxHxT = 62x53x42 cm, inlet at H59, outlet at H40 lower edge).
description.original: Für die Gesteinssäge ist ein Schlammfänger (Gipsabscheider) vorzusehen, wie z.B: Fabr. BOTZ TA 1 03 Tonabscheider (BxHxT = 62x53x42cm, ZUL in H59, ABL in H40 (Unterkante).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Weighing Tables

description.en: Specifications for weighing table construction and surfaces.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Weighing table construction with contact and damping protection

description.en: The weighing table must have a 4-leg steel frame with vibration-absorbing damping elements, all-round cladding made of melamine resin panels for contact protection, and overall construction ensuring contact and damping protection for the weighing plate.
description.original: Die Konstruktion der Tische muss einen Berührungs- und Dämpfungsschutz für die Wägeplatte gewährleisten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Weighing plate: reinforced concrete with terrazzo surface

description.en: The weighing plate must be made of reinforced concrete with a terrazzo surface.
description.original: Wägeplatte aus Stahlbeton mit Terrazzo-Oberfläche

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Weighing table work surfaces: stoneware composite panel

description.en: Work surfaces must be made of stoneware composite panel.
description.original: Arbeitsflächen aus Steinzeug-Verbundplatte.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Curtains and Containment

description.en: Specifications for blackout curtains, splash protection, and liquid collection containers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Blackout curtain dimensions: rail length and drop height specified per item

description.en: The individual item descriptions specify the rail running length and drop height; additional material for pleating must be considered (medium to strong pleating, factor 1:2 to 1:3).
description.original: In den Einzelpositionsbeschreibungen angegeben sind die Abmessungen der Schienenlauflänge sowie der Abhanghöhe, zus. Materialbedarf bzgl. Faltenwurf ist zu berücksichtigen (mittlerer bis starker Faltenwurf, Faktor 1:2 bis 1:3).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Use reference fabric Dimout 99% E2010 or E2011 or equivalent

description.en: The reference fabric for the curtain is Dimout 99% E2010 or E2011, weight approx. 270 g/m², flame retardant per EN 13773, washable, material 100% PES FR, from Englisch Dekor or equivalent.
description.original: Abdunkelungsvorhang Dimout 99% E2010 oder E2011, Gewicht ca. 270g/m², schwer entflammbar nach EN 13773, waschbar, Material 100% PES FR, Fa. Englisch Dekor oder gleichwertig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Use reference fabric Blackout 100% V7541 or V7542 or equivalent

description.en: The reference fabric for the curtain is Blackout 100% V7541 or V7542, weight approx. 295 g/m², flame retardant per EN 13773, washable, material 100% PES FR, from Englisch Dekor or equivalent.
description.original: Abdunkelungsvorhang Blackout 100% V7541 oder V7542, Gewicht ca. 295g/m², schwer entflammbar nach EN 13773, waschbar, Material 100% PES FR, Fa. Englisch Dekor oder gleichwertig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Use splash protection curtain material if specified in individual item description

description.en: If the individual item description specifies a splash protection curtain, a deviation from the two above variants is required, and a correspondingly robust, wipeable curtain material must be used.
description.original: Sofern in der Einzelpositionsbeschreibung angegeben, ist der Vorhang als Spritzschutzvorhang auszuführen, hier ist bei von den beiden o.a. Varianten abzugehen und ein entsprechend robustes, abwischbares Vorhangmaterial zu verwenden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Provide liquid collection containers if specified in performance schedule

description.en: If indicated in the performance schedule, liquid collection containers made of plastic or steel must be planned, including all connections and closures.
description.original: Falls in der Leistungsaufstellung angegeben, so sind Flüssigkeits-Auffangbehälter aus Kunststoff bzw. Stahl inkl. sämtlicher Anschlüsse und Verschlüsse einzuplanen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drip tray for 2 x 200L drums, PE, with galvanised grid

description.en: Provide 4 units of drip trays for 2 drums each (200L capacity), dimensions approx. L x W = 125 x 85 cm, height approx. 320 mm, including galvanised grid, material PE, equivalent to Asecos 'Auffangwanne PE mit Gitterrost' or equivalent.
description.original: Auffangwanne für je 2 Stk. Fässer (Fassinhalt 200 Liter), Abmessungen ca. L x B = 125 x 85cm, Höhe ca. 320mm, inkl. Gitterrost verzinkt, Material der Wanne PE, wie Asecos 'Auffangwanne PE mit Gitterrost' oder gleichwertig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Supply transport trolley/cart for liquid collection containers

description.en: A transport trolley or cart with two fixed castors, two swivel castors, and a handle must be supplied for transporting the containers.
description.original: Zum Transport der Behälter ist ein Transportwagen mit je zwei Bock- und Lenkrollen sowie Handbügel zu liefern.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Transport cart with spill containment tray for two 200L drums

description.en: The transport cart must also function as a spill containment tray, made of polypropylene (PP), and be located together with the collection containers in the base. Provide a spill containment tray for two 200-liter drums, dimensions approx. L x W = 125 x 85 cm, height approx. 320 mm, including galvanized grid, steel tray material, like Asecos 'Auffangwanne lackiert, Stahl mit Gitterrost und Staplerschuhen' or equivalent.
description.original: Dieser Transportwagen dient gleichzeitig als Auffangwanne (Material der Auffangwanne PP), und ist zusammen mit den Auffangbehältern im Unterbau situiert.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Alarm and Monitoring

description.en: Specifications for alarm systems and monitoring.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Visual and acoustic indicator near the sink with acknowledgment and reset behavior

description.en: A visual and acoustic indicator must be mounted near the sink to signal when a container change is needed. The acoustic signal must be able to be acknowledged (silenced). The visual indicator must only turn off after the container has been changed.
description.original: Eine optische und akustische Anzeigeeinrichtung, welche im Nahbereich der Spüle montiert sein muss, soll auf einen notwendigen Behälterwechsel hinweisen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sanitary Fittings

description.en: Specifications for sanitary fittings, valves, and surface protection.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sanitary fittings: heavy brass per DIN 12918

description.en: Sanitary fittings must be heavy brass construction according to DIN 12918 (parts 1 and 2).
description.original: Laborarmaturen in schwerer Messingausführung nach DIN 12 918 (Teil 1 und 2)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plastic operating elements with color coding and labeling per DIN EN 13792

description.en: Fittings must have plastic operating elements (e.g., polyamide) with color coding and labeling according to DIN EN 13792. Labeling must be in German language, media designation according to DIN EN 13792.
description.original: Bedienungselemente in Kunststoff (z.B. Polyamid), Farbkennzeichnung und Beschriftung nach DIN EN 13 792

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Suitable for pressure-resistant storage

description.en: Fittings must be suitable for pressure-resistant storage.
description.original: Geeignet für druckfeste Speicher.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Valves with maintenance-free ceramic tops (180° rotation)

description.en: Valves must be equipped with maintenance-free ceramic tops with a 180° rotation range.
description.original: Ventile müssen mit wartungsfreien Keramik-Oberteilen (Drehbereich 180°) ausgestattet sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: RO water fittings made of all-plastic

description.en: Fittings for RO water must be made entirely of plastic; no shut-off valves allowed in RO water ring lines.
description.original: Armaturen für RO-Wasser aus Vollkunststoff (in den RO-Wasser-Ringleitungen dürfen keine Absperrventile eingebaut werden).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Surface protection: epoxy powder coating or plastic jacket, acid-resistant

description.en: Fittings must have surface protection via epoxy resin powder coating or plastic jacket. Fittings must be acid-resistant, surfaces protected with epoxy powder coating, color gray RAL 7004 or similar.
description.original: Oberflächenschutz der Armaturen durch Epoxidharz-Pulverbeschichtung oder Kunststoffmantel.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Anti-rotation securing with rosettes and cams

description.en: All fittings must be secured against unintentional rotation using rosettes with cams.
description.original: Alle Armaturen sind gegen unbeabsichtigte Verdrehung zu sichern (Rosetten mit Nocken).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Removable media-compatible spouts per DIN 12898 with flat seal

description.en: Fittings must have removable media-compatible spouts according to DIN 12898 and reliable flat seals.
description.original: Armaturen mit abnehmbaren mediengerechten Tüllen nach DIN 12 898 und zuverlässiger Flachdichtung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Standard threads for device connection

description.en: Standard threads must allow device connection.
description.original: Standardgewinde ermöglichen auch Geräteanschluss.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Solenoid valves for all gas lines, 230V, normally closed

description.en: For each gas line leaving a gas cylinder cabinet, a solenoid valve (type 230V, normally closed) must be provided and installed directly at the outlet of the pressure reducer inside the cabinet. deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Hose nozzles must comply with DIN 12898 and have an olive shape to prevent hose slipping under load

description.en: Hose nozzles must be manufactured according to DIN 12898 and should have an olive shape. The olive shape prevents hoses according to DIN 4815 and DIN 30664 from slipping under a tensile load of approx. 5 kg without additional fastening.
description.original: Schlauchtüllen müssen nach DIN 12898 ausgeführt sein und sollten die Form von Oliven haben.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas Supply Equipment

description.en: Requirements for gas cylinder cabinets, pressure reducing stations, and related equipment.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas cylinder cabinet with accessories

description.en: The tender requires the provision of gas cylinder cabinets (total quantity as per bill of quantities, including 3 units for room 2.OG.14 High Vacuum Laboratory) for storage of compressed gas cylinders (50 liters, 200 bar) in compliance with DIN EN 14470. Each cabinet must include bottle holders, an insert shelf for smaller cylinders, a foldable ramp for easier placement, and mounting rails for a pressure reduction station. Item code G2.13.24.26.01 applies.
description.original: Unterbringung von Druckgasflaschen (Anzahl der Flaschen siehe LV) mit einem Inhalt von 50l und einem Fülldruck von 200bar gemäß DIN EN 14 470.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinets must be designed as safety cell G90

description.en: The cabinets must be designed as safety cell G90.
description.original: Die Schränke müssen als Sicherheitszelle G90 ausgelegt sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Provide at least two pipe penetrations for gas lines per cylinder space

description.en: Per cylinder space, provide at least two pipe penetrations for gas lines and one appropriate penetration for signal lines in the cabinet ceiling.
description.original: Pro Flaschenstellplatz sind mindestens zwei Rohrdurchführungen für Gasleitungen und eine entsprechende Durchführung für Signalleitungen in der Schrankdecke vorzusehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Cabinet material: multi-wall steel plates with quality-monitored insulation

description.en: Cabinet material must be multi-wall construction from steel plates with quality-monitored insulation material, executed as safety cell G90.
description.original: Material des Schrankes: Mehrwandige Fertigung aus Stahlplatten mit güteüberwachtem Isoliermaterial, als Sicherheitszelle G90 ausgeführt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Preferred manufacturer for cabinets: Asecos or equivalent

description.en: The preferred manufacturer for cabinets is Asecos or equivalent.
description.original: Richtfabrikat: Fa. Asecos oder gleichwertig.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pressure reducing station for one gas cylinder

description.en: The tender requires a pressure reducing station for a single gas cylinder, designed for high-purity gases with single-sided gas supply. It must be a single-stage pressure reducing station.
description.original: Druckminderstation für eine Flasche: Flaschenstation für Reinstgase zur einseitigen Gasversorgung. - Druckminderstation in einstufiger Ausführung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas bottle cabinet for ground floor room EG.09

description.en: Provide one gas bottle cabinet for ground floor room EG.09 (11.30/11.31) for low/high temperature gas fitting, N2, hose nozzle G0.09.24.16.02.
description.original: Gasflaschenschrank G0.09.24.26.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR ST 1,00 LO

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: One helium bottle with pressure reducing station

description.en: Supply one helium bottle including one pressure reducing station for helium (1 bottle).
description.original: 1 Flasche, 1x He inkl. 1 Stk. Druckminderstation (1 Flasche) für He

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Solenoid valve for each gas line outlet

description.en: Include one solenoid valve (230V, normally closed) for each gas line outlet, installed in the gas line directly above the cabinet.
description.original: inkl. 1 Stk. Magnetventil (je Leitungsabgang), 230V, stromlos geschlossen, eingebaut in Gasleitung direkt oberhalb des Schrankes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas bottle cabinet for 3 bottles (1x O2, 2x He) with pressure reducer and automatic switchover

description.en: Provide a gas bottle cabinet for 3 bottles (1x O2, 2x He) including 1 pressure reducer station for O2, 1 automatic switchover station for He (1+1 bottle), and 1 solenoid valve per line outlet (230V, normally closed) installed in the gas line directly above the cabinet.
description.original: Gasflaschenschrank G2.11.24.26.01: 3 Flaschen, 1x O2, 2x He inkl. 1 Stk. Druckminderstation (1 Flasche) für O2 inkl. 1 Stk. automatische Umschaltstation (1+1 Flasche) für He inkl. 1 Stk. Magnetventil (je Leitungsabgang), 230V, stromlos geschlossen, eingebaut in Gasleitung direkt oberhalb des Schrankes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas bottle cabinet for 1 bottle (1x synthetic air) with pressure reducer and solenoid valve

description.en: Provide a gas bottle cabinet for 1 bottle (1x synthetic air) including 1 pressure reducer station for synthetic air and 1 solenoid valve per line outlet (230V, normally closed) installed in the gas line directly above the cabinet.
description.original: Gasflaschenschrank G2.11.24.26.02: 1 Flasche, 1x synth. Luft inkl. 1 Stk. Druckminderstation (1 Flasche) für synth. Luft inkl. 1 Stk. Magnetventil (je Leitungsabgang), 230V, stromlos geschlossen, eingebaut in Gasleitung direkt oberhalb des Schrankes.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Suitable for gases including gas quality 5.0

description.en: The pressure reduction station must be suitable for gases, including gas quality 5.0.
description.original: Geeignet für Gase inkl. der Gasqualität 5.0.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pressure reducer with inlet and outlet pressure gauges

description.en: The station must include a pressure reducer with inlet and outlet pressure gauges.
description.original: Druckminderer mit Ein-und Ausgangsmanometer

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Relief valve with pipe connection for changeover station

description.en: The station must include a relief valve with a pipe connection. The automatic changeover station must include a relief valve.
description.original: Abblaseventil mit Rohranschluss

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: High-pressure purge valve for self-purging with pipe connection

description.en: The station (including automatic changeover station) must include a high-pressure purge valve for self-purging with a pipe connection.
description.original: HochdruckSpülventil für Eigengasspülung mit Rohranschluss

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Automatic changeover station 1+1 bottle with connection elbow and 3 pressure reducers

description.en: The automatic changeover station for 1+1 bottles must include a connection elbow according to ÖNORM M 7390 and an automatic changeover unit with 3 pressure reducers.
description.original: Automatische Umschaltstation 1+1 Flasche: - Anschlussbogen (Anschluss nach ÖNORM M 7390)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Inlet and outlet pressure gauges for changeover station

description.en: The automatic changeover station must include inlet and outlet pressure gauges.
description.original: Ein-und Ausgangsmanometer

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sensor for empty and failure alarm

description.en: The automatic changeover station must include a sensor for empty and failure alarm.
description.original: Geber für Leer-und Ausfallsmelder

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Inlet pressure max 200 x 10^5 Pa

description.en: The pressure reducer or changeover station must have a maximum inlet pressure of 200 x 10^5 Pa.
description.original: Vordruck: max. 200 * 10^5 Pa

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Outlet pressure 0 - 10 x 10^5 Pa

description.en: The pressure reducer or changeover station must have an outlet pressure range of 0 to 10 x 10^5 Pa.
description.original: Hinterdruck: 0 - 10 * 10^5 Pa

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Leak rate < 10^-7 Pa*l/s

description.en: The pressure reducer or changeover station must have a leak rate of less than 10^-7 Pa*l/s.
description.original: Leckrate: < 10 - 7 Pa*I/s

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: PCTFE seal set

description.en: The pressure reducer or changeover station must be equipped with a PCTFE seal set.
description.original: PCTFE-Dichtsatz

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Valve and pressure reducer data sheets must be included

description.en: Data sheets of the offered valves and pressure reducers must be attached to the offer.
description.original: Typenblätter der angebotenen Armaturen und Druckminderstationen sind dem Angebot beizulegen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sampling Points

description.en: Requirements for gas and compressed air sampling points with regulators and manometers.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas sampling points must include pressure regulators with safety manometers

description.en: For all gas sampling points, pressure regulators including safety manometers must be included unless otherwise specified in the performance list. Pressure ranges: 1-10 bar, 0.2-1.5 bar, or 0.4-4 bar, each with fine adjustment valve and manometer.
description.original: für sämtliche Gasentnahmestellen Entnahmedruckminderer (inkl. Sicherheitsmanometer) einzukalkulieren (Druckbereich entweder 1 bis 10bar, 0,2 bis 1,5bar oder 0,4 bis 4 bar, jeweils mit Feinregulierventil inkl. Manometer)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compressed air sampling points must have couplings and manometers

description.en: All compressed air sampling points must be equipped with couplings and manometers, unless otherwise specified.
description.original: Sämtliche Druckluftentnahmestellen sind mit Kupplungen und Manometern auszustatten, sofern nicht anders angegeben.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Fuel gas sampling points must comply with DIN 12918-2

description.en: Sampling points for fuel gases must be designed according to DVGW worksheet G260 and DIN 12918-2, with pressure range PN0.2, nominal width DN10, anti-tamper protection, open/closed position visible via bar marking on handle, flow >= 0.25 m³/h at 2500 Pa, fixed nozzle 3/8", and DIN DVGW approval.
description.original: Die Entnahmestellen für Brenngase nach DVGW-Arbeitsblatt G260 müssen gemäß DIN 12918-2 ausgeführt werden und folgende Details aufweisen: - Druckbereich PN0,2 - Nennweite DN10 - Sicherung gegen unbeabsichtigtes Öffnen - die Stellung offen oder geschlossen muss mittels Balkenmarkierung am Handgriff erkennbar sein - Durchfluss >= 0,25 m3/h bei 2500 Pa - feste Tülle 3/8" - DIN DVGW Zulassung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Technical gas sampling points must comply with DIN 12918-3

description.en: Sampling points for technical gases must be designed according to DIN 12918-3 with pressure range PN16, nominal width DN10, maintenance-free needle top with replaceable seat (needle does not contact seat when closed, PTFE flat seal), play-free fine thread M10 x 1 mm, spindle stroke min. 3-4 turns, and maintenance-free grease chamber top with approx. 1.5 spindle turns adjustment range for rough vacuum.
description.original: Die Entnahmestellen für technische Gase müssen gemäß DIN 12918-3 ausgeführt werden und folgende Details aufweisen: - Druckbereich PN16 - Nennweite DN10 - wartungsfreies Nadeloberteil mit austauschbarem Einlegesitz, die Nadel der Spindel liegt auch im geschlossenen Zustand nicht am Sitz an, es dichtet eine PTFE-Flachdichtung. Das Oberteil verfügt über ein spielfreies Feingewinde M 10 x 1 mm. Der Spindelhub beträgt min. 3 - 4 Umdrehungen. - wartungsfreies Fettkammeroberteil (FOT) mit ca. 1,5 Spindelumdrehungen Einstellbereich für Grobvakuum.

description.en: Requirements for quick couplings including dimensions, operation, and materials.

description.en: If a quick coupling with plug-in nozzle is required, it must be executed as specified.
description.original: Sofern in der Leistungsbeschreibung eine Schnellkupplung mit Stecktülle gefordert ist, so ist diese wie folgt auszuführen:

description.en: The quick coupling must have a nominal width of 7.8.
description.original: Nennweite 7,8

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quick coupling one-hand operation

description.en: The quick coupling must be operable with one hand.
description.original: Einhandbedienung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quick coupling housing material brass, nickel-plated surface

description.en: The quick coupling housing must be made of brass with a nickel-plated surface.
description.original: Gehäuse Werkstoff Messing Oberfläche vernickelt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quick coupling valve material zinc, nickel-plated surface

description.en: The quick coupling valve must be made of zinc with a nickel-plated surface.
description.original: Ventil Werkstoff Zink Oberfläche vernickelt

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quick coupling springs and balls material stainless steel

description.en: The springs and balls in the quick coupling must be made of stainless steel.
description.original: Federn und Kugeln Werkstoff Edelstahl

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Quick coupling seals Buna N

description.en: The seals in the quick coupling must be made of Buna N.
description.original: Dichtungen Buna N

description.en: The locking sleeve of the quick coupling must be made of anodized aluminum and color-coded.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Valves and Fittings

description.en: Requirements for valves, fittings, and related components.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Valve seats of mixing batteries serve as union nut fastening

description.en: The valve seats of the mixing batteries are also the fastening of the union nuts.
description.original: Die Ventilsitze der Mischbatterien sind zugleich Befestigung der Überwurfmuttern.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Spindle hub min. 3-4 turns

description.en: The spindle hub must have a minimum of 3 to 4 turns.
description.original: Spindelhub beträgt min. 3 - 4 Umdrehungen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Maintenance-free grease chamber top part with approx. 1.5 spindle turns adjustment range for rough vacuum

description.original: Laborraumregelung G4.19.09.02.01 LO 2x Digestorium 2x Punktabsaugung (schaltbar)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory room control G4.20.09.02.01 for 2 fume cupboards and 2 point exhausts

description.en: Provide a laboratory room control system, type G4.20.09.02.01, for 2 fume cupboards and 2 switchable point exhausts, quantity 1.00 unit.
description.original: Laborraumregelung G4.20.09.02.01 EUR PP EUR EP EUR SO EUR ST 1,00 LO 2x Digestorium 2x Punktabsaugung (schaltbar)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Room Equipment

description.en: Media connections and break room equipment.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Room 4.OG.04A (11.53.1) - Aufenthalt G4 with media connections KW, WW

description.en: The room designated as 4.OG.04A (11.53.1) - Aufenthalt G4 must have cold water (KW) and warm water (WW) media connections.
description.original: Medien: KW, WW

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Room 6.OG.04 (11.55) - Break room G6 with media connections

description.en: The room designated as 6.OG.04 (11.55) on the 6th floor is a break room (Aufenthalt) with media connections for cold water (KW) and warm water (WW). It includes a sink and funnel basin (Spülen und Trichterbecken) and a washbasin (Waschbecken) with item number G6.04.14.05.01.
description.original: 6.Obergeschoß Raum: 6.OG.04 (11.55) - Aufenthalt G6 Medien: KW, WW G6.04.14 Spülen und Trichterbecken Waschbecken G6.04.14.05.01

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical and Personnel

description.en: Grounding connections and personnel definitions.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Erdungsanschluss / Erdungsbuchse

description.en: Provide a grounding connection or grounding socket for the laboratory.
description.original: Erdungsanschluss I Erdungsbuchse

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Senior fitter definition: qualified skilled worker with completed apprenticeship

description.en: Senior fitter is defined as a qualified skilled worker with completed apprenticeship, extensive knowledge, and ability to independently perform all relevant work economically and responsibly after brief instruction.
description.original: Qualifizierter Facharbeiter mit abgeschlossener Berufsausbildung (Lehrabschlussprüfung), große Fachkenntnisse; Befähigung, alle berufseinschlägigen Arbeiten nach kurzer Anweisung selbstständig unter Berücksichtigung wirtschaftlicher Gesichtspunkte, verantwortungsbewußt zu verrichten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Helper fitter definition: worker with specialized training and experience

description.en: Helper fitter is defined as a worker with specialized training, corresponding work experience, and responsibility.
description.original: Arbeiter mit Zweckausbildung, entsprechender Arbeitserfahrung und Verantwortung.

description.en: Logistics

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Delivery Constraints

description.en: Requirements related to physical or logistical limitations affecting deliveries.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Extreme space shortage on site, no external intermediate storage, must be considered during deliveries

description.en: The area around the new building is extremely tight, so no intermediate storage can be set up outside the building. The space shortage must also be taken into account during deliveries.
description.original: Das Areal um das neu errichtete Gebäude ist von äußerster Platzknappheit geprägt, sodass einerseits keine Zwischenlager außerhalb des Gebäudes errichtet werden können.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Delivery Scheduling

description.en: Requirements concerning the timing and sequencing of deliveries.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Staggered delivery is unavoidable

description.en: A staggered delivery is unavoidable, and all necessary expenses for this must be included in the unit prices.
description.original: Eine gestaffelte Anlieferung ist deshalb unumgänglich, sämtliche hierfür erforderlichen Aufwendungen sind kalkulatorisch zu berücksichtigen und in den Einheitspreisen entsprechend abzubilden.

description.en: Scope of Work

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: General Scope

description.en: Overall scope of work including delivery and installation.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Scope includes delivery and installation of lab furniture

description.en: The scope includes delivery and installation of laboratory furniture and components such as fume hoods, safety cabinets, and point exhausts.
description.original: Lieferung und Montage von Labormöbeln, sowie die Lieferung und betriebsfertige Montage von Labormöbelkomponenten wie Digestorien, Sicherheitsschränken, Punktabsaugungen, usw.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe Routing

description.en: Responsibilities for pipe routing from interface points.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipe routing from interface point is contractor's responsibility

description.en: From the interface point (ball valves), the pipe routing is the contractor's responsibility.
description.original: Ab dieser Schnittstelle obliegt die Leitungsführung dem Auftragnehmer

description.en: Compliance

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Regulatory Compliance

description.en: Requirements ensuring adherence to laws, regulations, and standards.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Deviations from binding standards, regulations, legal requirements are not allowed

description.en: Any deviation from binding norms, regulations, rules, or legal requirements is strictly prohibited.
description.original: Abweichungen von bindenden Normen, Vorschriften, Regelwerken, gesetzlichen Vorgaben, etc. sind keinesfalls zulässig.

description.en: Installation

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sample and Assembly

description.en: Requirements for sample components, on-site assembly, and partial handover.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sample components must be provided exactly as specified, no deviations except color

description.en: The bidder must provide sample furniture components exactly in the quality specified in the performance description; no deviations are allowed except for color.
description.original: vom Bieter die einzelnen Möbelkomponenten exakt in der, in diesem LV geforderten Qualität zur Bemusterung bereit zu stellen sind (keine Abweichungen zulässig, außer bei Farbe)!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Sample components must be assembled on-site as a connected furniture unit

description.en: The components delivered for sampling must be set up on-site as a connected furniture assembly, noting that the laboratory bench may be positioned in the middle of the room.
description.original: Die zur Bemusterung gelieferten Komponenten sind vor Ort als ein zusammenhängender Möbelverbau aufzustellen, wobei darauf hingewiesen wird, dass die Laborzeile ggf. mittig im Raum stehen wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Partial handover possible per floor

description.en: Partial handover dates may be scheduled according to construction progress, with the smallest handover unit being at least one floor.
description.original: Dem Bauablauf entsprechend können Teilübernahmetermine vorgesehen sein, wobei als kleinste Übernahmeeinheit mindestens ein Stockwerk definiert wird.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All works complete at handover

description.en: All services listed in this specification must be completed in the respective acceptance area at the time of handover.
description.original: Zum Zeitpunkt der Übernahmen haben sämtliche in dieser Leistungsbeschreibung angeführten Leistungen im jeweiligen Abnahmebereich fertiggestellt zu sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Logistics and Coordination

description.en: Requirements for elevator use, drilling restrictions, pipe accommodation, and trade coordination.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Elevator availability and usage conditions for furniture placement

description.en: The contractor must assume the elevator may not be available for positioning furniture components in the building. If the elevator is available, it will not have TÜV approval, so use requires a lift attendant provided by the elevator supplier.
description.original: Es ist davon auszugehen, dass zur Verortung der Möbelkomponenten im Gebäude die Liftanlage ggf. nicht zur Verfügung steht

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Drilling in floor only after consultation with site supervision

description.en: Necessary drillings in the floor may only be carried out after consultation with the local site supervision (ÖBA).
description.original: Notwendige Bohrungen im Fußboden dürfen nur nach Absprache mit der ÖBA durchgeführt werden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: No drilling in ceiling or core drilling allowed

description.en: Drillings in the ceiling and core drillings are not permitted.
description.original: Bohrungen in der Decke sowie Kernbohrungen sind nicht erlaubt.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Consider surface-mounted wastewater pipes in furniture area

description.en: Wastewater pipes (mainly condensate drains) run on the surface in the furniture installation area and must be taken into account during furnishing.
description.original: Teilweise verlaufen im Aufstellbereich des Möbels Abwasserleitungen (vorwiegend Kondensatabläufe) aufputz, sodass diese im Zuge der Möblierung entsprechend zu berücksichtigen sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture design and installation consider special isotope lab requirements

description.en: Furniture execution and installation must take into account the special requirements of the isotope lab area, including no inaccessible cavities and smooth, easy-to-clean surfaces.
description.original: die Möbelausführung und Montage hat auf die für diesen Bereich speziellen Anforderungen Rücksicht zu nehmen (keine unzugänglichen Hohlräume, glatte, leicht zu reinigende Oberflächen)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Continuous laboratory construction adapted to local conditions

description.en: Despite individual element descriptions, the furniture must be manufactured and adapted to local conditions to form a continuous laboratory construction that matches the execution descriptions and plan attachments.
description.original: Trotz der Beschreibung der einzelnen Elemente sind die Einrichtungen so herzustellen und den örtlichen Gegebenheiten anzupassen, dass sich ein durchgehender Laborverbau ergibt, der den nachfolgend angeführten Ausführungsbeschreibungen und Planbeilagen entspricht.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Coordination with trades and site supervision

description.en: The contractor must perform all coordination tasks, including coordination with the ventilation trade, static assessment, and coordination with site supervision (ÖBA) and other executing parties. These services are included in the corresponding items and are not separately listed in the specification. Integration must be done in coordination with executing parties and the ÖBA as per the specified items.
description.original: Die Koordination bzgl. ev. erforderlicher Abstimmungspunkte zum Gewerk Lüftung obliegt dem Auftragnehmer.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Technical contact person must be present on site if required

description.en: If the local construction management deems it necessary, the appointed technical contact person must be present on the construction site upon request.
description.original: Falls es von der örtlichen Bauleitung für erforderlich gehalten wird, muss dieser Sachbearbeiter nach Anforderung auf der Baustelle anwesend sein.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical and IT Cabling

description.en: Requirements for electrical connections, cable routing, IT cabling, and labeling.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Vertical cable routing from interface to furniture

description.en: The cable routing from the interface to the furniture must run vertically, analogous to gas and water pipes. If necessary, the cable routing must be fastened to the raw ceiling to ensure a vertical run. Visible lines must be laid strictly vertically.
description.original: Die Kabelführung ab der Schnittstelle bis ins Möbel hat dabei - analog zu Gas- und Wasserleitungen - senkrecht zu verlaufen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Routing of separate building-side supply cables for built-in devices

description.en: If devices such as laboratory glasswashers are built into a laboratory row, any additional separate building-side supply cables must be routed analogously to the appropriate location in the laboratory furniture assembly.
description.original: Werden in einer Laborzeile Geräte, wie z. B. Laborglasspüler, etc. eingebaut, so ist das ggf. zusätzlich vorhandene separate bauseitige Versorgungskabel analog zu oben an die entsprechende Stelle im Labormöbelverbau zu verlegen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Baskets must be routed on separate levels above water and wastewater pipes

description.en: Cable baskets must be installed on separate levels, both above the level of any existing water and wastewater pipes.
description.original: Körbe sind in getrennten Ebenen zu führen, wobei beide Ebenen über dem Niveau der ggf. vorhandenen Wasser- und Abwasserleitungen zu führen sind.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Routing of supply cables from defined interface into furniture

description.en: Laboratory rows must receive one or more of the specified network supply cables (each 5x6mm²), which are to be routed into the furniture by the contractor. The supply cable for high-power sockets must be routed from the defined interface by the laboratory furniture contractor into the furniture.
description.original: Sofern erforderlich erhalten Laborzeilen eine oder mehrere der o.a. Netzzuleitungen (jeweils 5x6mm²-Kabel). Diese sind vom AN entsprechend in das Möbel zu führen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connection to terminal clamps in lab furniture by contractor

description.en: The connection to the terminal clamps in the lab furniture must be performed by the contractor.
description.original: Der Anschluss an die Anschlussklemmen im Labormöbel hat durch den Auftragnehmer zu erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Inclusive electrical connection plug

description.en: The washer must include an electrical connection plug.
description.original: Inklusive Elektro-Anschlussstecker

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical connection point in the under-counter area next to the dishwasher

description.en: The electrical connection point must be arranged in the area of the under-counter cabinet next to the dishwasher.
description.original: Die Elektro-Anschlussstelle ist im Bereich des Unterschrankes neben der Spülmaschine anzuordnen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical connection by contractor

description.en: The contractor must connect the operating display using the electrical line provided by the client.
description.original: Dazu steht bauseits eine Elektroleitung zur Verfügung. Der Anschluss hat durch den AN zu erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Routing of supply lines from safety power supply network

description.en: Supply lines from the safety power supply network must also be routed analogously to the appropriate location in the laboratory furniture assembly.
description.original: dies gilt auch für Zuleitungen aus dem Netz der Sicherheitsstromversorgung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Supply and installation of sockets for devices

description.en: The supply and installation of sockets for connecting the mentioned devices is included in the contractor's scope of services. Sockets should be installed within the fume hood in a back wall module or in the panel below the work surface, as per item description. If not defined, sockets must be provided outside the fume hood.
description.original: Die Lieferung und der Einbau von Steckdosen zum Anschluss der erwähnten Geräte ist im Leistungsumfang des Auftragnehmers erfasst

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connect furniture to equipotential bonding line

description.en: Each furniture assembly must be connected by the contractor to the existing equipotential bonding (PA) connection line on the building side. Metallic furniture parts must be conductively connected to each other by the contractor, especially components connected to the exhaust air duct such as safety cabinets and fume hoods. The connection to the equipotential bonding must be made by the laboratory furniture manufacturer.
description.original: Jeder Möbelverband ist durch den Auftragnehmer an die bauseits vorhandene PA-Anschlussleitung anzuschließen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Contractor must connect electrical supply to solenoid valves

description.en: The electrical connection prepared by the client must be connected by the contractor to the solenoid valve.
description.original: Der bauseits vorbereitete elektrische Anschluss ist durch den AN am Magnetventil anzuschließen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Route IT cabling vertically from above into lab bench

description.en: IT cabling must be routed vertically from above into the laboratory bench and then to the installation points within the furniture, similar to the 5x6mm² cable routing from the cable tray/transfer point in the false ceiling.
description.original: Die EDV-Verkabelung ist senkrecht von oben in die Laborzeile zu führen und im Labormöbel an die Einbaustellen im Möbel zu führen. Leitungsführung analog zum 5x6mm²-Kabel, ausgehend von der Kabeltasse / Übergabepunkt Zwischendecke.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Provide empty conduit for each RJ45 dual outlet

description.en: An empty conduit must be provided in the laboratory furniture for each RJ45 dual outlet.
description.original: Im Labormöbel ist für jede RJ45-Doppeldose eine Leerdose vorzusehen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical trade connects cabling to RJ45 outlet

description.en: The connection of the cabling to the building-provided RJ45 dual outlet is to be carried out by the electrical trade (the quantity of required IT empty conduits is specified in the bill of quantities).
description.original: Der Anschluss der Verkabelung an die bauseits bereitgestellte RJ45-Doppeldose erfolgt durch das Gewerk Elektro (Im LV ist die Menge der erforderlichen EDV-Leerdosen angegeben).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Route cables in separate channels with trays/baskets, observe bending radii, and keep above water pipes

description.en: Power and data cables must be routed in separate channels, including within furniture. Cable trays or baskets must be provided for horizontal routing in furniture to ensure orderly separation. Bending radii must be observed. These trays/baskets must be installed in separate levels, both above any existing water and wastewater pipes.
description.original: Die Leitungsführung von Stark- und Schwachstrom von der beschriebenen Schnittstelle hat in getrennten Kanälen zu erfolgen (auch im Möbel).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Routing and installation of power and low-voltage cables

description.en: The contractor must perform routing and laying of power and low current lines (including connection), specifically route and install power and low-voltage cables, including hangers and cable ducts, from interfaces to the connection point in the media channel fuse box.
description.original: Leitungsführung und -verlegung der Stark- und Schwachstromleitungen (inkl.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Electrical socket material including RCD and fuses

description.en: Provision of all required electrical socket material, including residual-current device (FI-Schalter) and fuses.
description.original: Erforderliches Elektro-Steckdosenmaterial, inkl. FI-Schalter und Sicherungen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Single common electrical supply point for multiple fume hoods

description.en: If multiple fume hoods are arranged side by side or integrated into a lab furniture row, only one common electrical supply point is provided by the client; internal wiring must be done by the contractor.
description.original: Sind mehrere Digestorien nebeneinander angeordnet, oder ist das Digestorium in einer Labormöbelzeile integriert, so ist bauseits nur ein gemeinsamer Elektro-Anspeisepunkt vorgesehen. Die interne Verdrahtung hat hierbei durch den AN zu erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Concealed electrical wiring for lighting

description.en: Electrical wiring to and between individual luminaires must be concealed in a mini cable duct or routed in the media cell.
description.original: Die elektrische Verkabelung zu, und zwischen den einzelnen Leuchten hat versteckt in einem Mini-Kabelkanal zu erfolgen bzw. ist in der Medienzelle zu führen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Mark airflow direction with durable stickers

description.en: The direction of airflow must be marked on the pipes using durable stickers.
description.original: ebenso ist die Richtung der Luftströmung an den Rohren mittels haltbarer Aufkleber zu kennzeichnen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Lines must be labeled with plastic film strips

description.en: Lines must be labeled using strips made of plastic film.
description.original: Die Leitungen sind mit Schriftstreifen aus einer Kunststofffolie zu kennzeichnen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Mark installation location on media cell panel

description.en: The installation location of the pipe separator must be marked on the media cell panel above the worktop.
description.original: Der Einbauort ist an der Medienzellenblende (oberhalb der Tischplatte) zu kennzeichnen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Label socket according to electrical specification

description.en: The labeling of the socket must be carried out by the laboratory furniture contractor according to the electrical specification.
description.original: Die Beschriftung der Steckdose hat entsprechend Vorgabe Elektro durch den AN Labormöbel zu erfolgen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Plumbing and Piping

description.en: Requirements for water, gas, and wastewater piping, including fittings and drains.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Gas and water lines must be introduced vertically from above into lab furniture

description.en: Gas and water lines must be introduced vertically from above into the laboratory furniture from the interface; the furniture (support frame, media cell) must be adapted if necessary to enable this vertical pipe routing. No bent supply lines are permitted in visible areas.
description.original: Die Gas- und Wasserleitungen sind ab der Schnittstelle senkrecht von oben in das Labormöbel einzuführen, ggf. ist das Möbel (Traggestell, Medienzelle) entsprechend anzupassen, um diese senkrechte Leitungsführung zu ermöglichen (im Sichtbereich sind keine gekröpften Zuleitungen zulässig).

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Complete piping of water and gas supply lines to and within furniture by contractor

description.en: The contractor must perform complete piping (including connection) of water and gas supply lines to and within the furniture, from defined interfaces to the connection point of the fittings.
description.original: Die komplette Verrohrung (inkl. Anschluss) von Wasser- und Gaszuleitungen zum, bzw. innerhalb des Möbels, ab den definierten Schnittstellen bis zum Anschlusspunkt der Armaturen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Complete piping and routing of wastewater lines from basin drain to building wastewater pipe

description.en: The contractor must perform complete piping (including connection) of wastewater lines from the basin drain to the junction point into the building's wastewater pipe. The contractor must connect the laboratory drain to the building's wastewater pipe at the junction point. Due to construction reasons, wastewater connections may be in the base area; the contractor must route the wastewater pipes through the underframe base into the media cell. The contractor must pull the wastewater pipes through the base area of the substructures into the media channel.
description.original: Die komplette Verrohrung (inkl. Anschluss) der Abwasserleitungen ab Beckenablauf bis zur Einmündungsstelle in die bauseitige Abwasserleitung

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Shut-off devices for cold and deionized water supply lines

description.en: For each device, shut-off devices (including labeling field) for cold water and deionized water supply lines must be installed above the work surface in the laboratory cell.
description.original: Für KW- und VE-Wasserversorgungsleitungen sind für jedes Gerät Absperreinrichtungen (inkl. Beschriftungsfeld) oberhalb der Arbeitsfläche in die Laborzeile einzubauen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Install pipe separator per DIN EN 1717

description.en: Installation of the pipe separator must be carried out according to DIN EN 1717, including all necessary shut-off valves and pipes (including connection to wastewater line).
description.original: Der Einbau durch den Auftragnehmer hat nach DIN EN 1717 zu erfolgen, sämtliche erforderlichen Absperrventile und Rohrleitungen (inkl. Anbindung an die Abwasserleitung) sind einzukalkulieren.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connect consumers via flexible armored hoses

description.en: If consumers such as hot water heaters or laboratory glass washers are to be provided, they must be connected from the angle valve using flexible armored hoses.
description.original: Sind Verbraucher wie z.B. Warmwasserspeicher, Laborglasspüler, etc. vorzusehen, so sind diese ausgehend vom Eckventil mittels flexiblen Panzerschläuchen anzuschließen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with standard 18 381 for gas, water, and wastewater installation work

description.en: The tender requires compliance with standard 18 381 for gas, water, and wastewater installation work.
description.original: 18 381 Gas-, Wasser- und Abwasserinstallationsarbeiten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Floor-level drains for media cell [F]

description.en: Provide floor-level drains near the media cell [F].
description.original: Abflüsse in Bodennähe vorsehen!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Floor-level drains for media cell [G]

description.en: Provide floor-level drains near the media cell [G].
description.original: Abflüsse in Bodennähe vorsehen!

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wing [C] with drain for pump module

description.en: Media wing [C] must have a drain provided via the media wing for a pump module.
description.original: Abfluss über Medienflügel vorsehen (Pumpmodul)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wing [B] with drain for pump module

description.en: Media wing [B] must have a drain provided via the media wing for a pump module.
description.original: Abfluss über Medienflügel vorsehen (Pumpmodul)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media wing [E] with drain for pump module

description.en: Media wing [E] must have a drain provided via the media wing for a pump module.
description.original: Abfluss über Medienflügel vorsehen (Pumpmodul)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Laboratory sink and funnel basin

description.en: Supply a laboratory sink with a funnel basin, single unit, including a cold water fitting.
description.original: Spülen und Trichterbecken Laborspüle, Einzel- Trichterbecken inkl. KW-Armatur

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Media connections for cleaning room

description.en: The cleaning room (Putzraum) requires cold water and hot water media connections.
description.original: Medien: - Kaltwasser, Warmwasser

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Complete piping of water and gas supply lines to/within the fume hood

description.en: The complete piping including connection of water and gas supply lines to and within the fume hood, from defined interfaces to the connection point of the fittings.
description.original: Die komplette Verrohrung (inkl. Anschluss) von Wasser- und Gaszuleitungen zum, bzw. innerhalb des Digestoriums, ab den definierten Schnittstellen bis zum Anschlusspunkt der Armaturen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Complete piping of wastewater lines from basin drain to building connection

description.en: The complete piping including connection of wastewater lines from the basin drain to the junction point with the building's wastewater line.
description.original: Die komplette Verrohrung (inkl. Anschluss) der Abwasserleitungen ab Beckenablauf bis zur Einmündungsstelle in die bauseitige Abwasserleitung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Complete piping including connection of exhaust air lines from safety cabinets

description.en: Complete piping including connection of exhaust air lines from safety cabinets in the substructure of the fume hood.
description.original: Komplette Verrohrung inkl. Anschluss der Abluftleitungen der Sicherheitsschränke im Unterbau des Digestoriums.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Required water and gas fittings

description.en: Provision of all necessary water and gas fittings.
description.original: Erforderliche Wasser – und Gasarmaturen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Pipes to be fastened at regular intervals

description.en: Pipes must be fastened to the wall or ceiling at regular intervals using suitable supports.
description.original: diese Rohre sind in regelmäßigen Abständen an der Wand oder an der Decke mittels geeigneter Aufnahmen zu befestigen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ventilation and Exhaust

description.en: Requirements for ventilation, exhaust air, and air technical connections.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Connect ventilation ducts ending at 290 cm above FFBO K

description.en: Ventilation ducts end primarily at 290 cm above FFBO K as free pipe ends; the contractor must make the connection and perform any adaptations or dimension adjustments.
description.original: Lüftungsleitungen enden vornehmlich 290cm über FFBO K als freies Rohrende... Der Anschluss ist durch den Auftragnehmer herzustellen. Etwaige Adaptierungen und Dimensionsanpassungen sind vom Auftragnehmer durchzuführen.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Adjustment and measurement of exhaust air components

description.en: Adjust and measure all exhaust air relevant components from this scope, including documented proof that required air volumes are met, if necessary jointly with the HVAC contractor, coordination by the contractor.
description.original: Einregulierung und Einmessung sämtlicher abluftrelevanter Komponenten aus dieser Leistungsaufstellung inkl. protokolliertem Nachweis, dass die erforderlichen Luftmengen eingehalten werden (falls notwendig gemeinsam mit AN HKLS, Koordination erfolgt durch den Auftragnehmer)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All air-conducting elements up to building exhaust pipe

description.en: All air-conducting elements up to the building's exhaust air pipe.
description.original: Sämtliche luftführende Elemente bis zum bauseitigen Abluftrohr.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Compliance with standard 18 379 for ventilation technical systems

description.en: The tender requires compliance with standard 18 379 for ventilation technical systems.
description.original: 18 379 Lüftungstechnische Anlagen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Ventilation: recirculating air, minimum supply/exhaust air (radiation)

description.en: The nuclear storage room must have recirculating air ventilation with minimum supply and exhaust air for radiation protection.
description.original: Lüftung: Umluft, Mindest Be-/Entlüftung (Strahlung)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Exhaust connection located outside the furniture

description.en: The exhaust air connection must be located outside the furniture.
description.original: Abluftanschluss liegt außerhalb des Möbels.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Exhaust air duct mounted behind baffle, ending as stub/nozzle above fume hood

description.en: The exhaust air duct must be mounted behind the baffle wall and end as a stub or nozzle above the fume hood.
description.original: Die Abluftleitung ist hinter der Prallwand zu montieren und endet als Stutzen oberhalb des Abzuges.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Normal under-counter cabinets must be connected to under-bench extraction

description.en: If normal under-counter cabinets are used instead of safety cabinets in the under-bench of fume hoods, they must be connected to the under-bench extraction system by suitable measures.
description.original: Werden anstelle von Sicherheitsschränken normale Unterschränke im Unterbau der Digestorien angeordnet, so sind diese durch geeignete Maßnahmen ebenfalls an die Unterbauabsaugung anzubinden.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: All air technical connections by laboratory furniture supplier

description.en: All air technical connections must be made by the laboratory furniture supplier and must be calculated accordingly (including mounting materials, clamps, sealing material, etc.).
description.original: Alle lufttechnischen Anschlüsse sind durch den Labormöbellieferanten herzustellen und entsprechend zu kalkulieren (Montagematerialien, Klemmen, Dichtmaterial, etc. sind einzukalkulieren)

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Delivery of exhaust duct components and connection to house installation by supplier

description.en: The laboratory furniture supplier must deliver exhaust duct components and connect the pre-installation to the house installation network.
description.original: Die Lieferung der Abluftleitungskomponenten und der Zusammenschluss der Vorinstallation mit dem Hausinstallationsnetz erfolgt durch den Labormöbellieferanten

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Exhaust connection for equipment (e.g. vacuum pumps) must be provided as described

description.en: The contractor must install an exhaust line from the interface (exhaust pipe ending at approx. 290 cm above finished floor, approx. DN75) vertically down the wall into the laboratory furniture, within the media cell/support frame, leading to the under-counter area. The line must be secured to the wall or media cell/support frame. The under-counter area must be exhausted via a pipe penetration in the media cell panel covered with a grid. The exhaust line must be equipped with stainless steel hose connectors for multiple consumers.
description.original: Diese Abluftanschlüsse von Geräten (z.B. Vakuumpumpen) sind wie nachfolgend beschrieben auszustatten: Bauseits endet hierfür ein Abluftrohr in ca. 290cm über der OKFFB, ca. DN75. Vom Auftragnehmer ist eine Abluftleitung ausgehend von der Schnittstelle senkrecht (an der Wand) nach unten in das Labormöbel zu führen ... Die Abluftleitung ist in ausreichendem Maße entweder an der Wand oder an der Medienzelle / dem Traggestell zu befestigen. Die Abluftleitung ist so auszuführen, dass der Untertischbereich (in welchem die Leitung mündet) ebenfalls abgesaugt wird. Dazu ist in der Medienzellenblende eine Rohrdurchführung auszuführen, welche mit einem Gitter abzudecken ist. Die Abluftleitung ist zum Anschließen mehrerer Verbraucher mit Schlauchanschluss mit Schlauchtüllen aus Edelstahl auszustatten.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Exhaust connection for laboratory cell, switchable

description.en: Provide an exhaust connection for the laboratory cell, switchable, with VSR pre-installed by the client, include on/off switch in the media cell, and integrate into the laboratory room control system.
description.original: Abluftanschluss für Laborzeile, Ausführung schaltbar, VSR bauseits vorgerichtet, Ein-/Aus-Schalter in Medienzelle vorsehen, inkl. Einbindung in Laborraumregelung.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Furniture and Equipment Installation

description.en: Requirements for installing furniture, equipment, and accessories.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Blenden bei Eckverbauten vorsehen

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: Contractor responsible for complete lab furniture system including all connections and media supply

All connections such as equipotential bonding, supply and exhaust air, and gas lines are included in the contractor's scope.
description.original: Die komplette Ausstattung des Labormöbelsystems, inklusive der Medienversorgung im Labormöbel, Absperrungen, Armaturen, Ablaufgarnituren udgl. obliegt dem Auftragnehmer.

description.original: im Labormöbel hat durch den Auftragnehmer zu erfolgen
